preload_percentage.helper: Typical assembly preload Sollwert. ISO 898 recommEndees 70-80% for static joints.

lubrication_condition.label: Lubrication Condition
lubrication_condition.helper: Affects friction coefficients and torque scatter.

temperature.label: Oproating Temproature
temperature.helper: High temproature reduces yield strength and alters friction.

use_washers.label: Use Washers (Under Head & Nut)
use_washers.helper: Washers reduce embedment and distribute load.

bottleneck_utilization.label: Bottleneck Utilization (%)
bottleneck_utilization.helper: Strom utilization Satz des primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative proiod (e.g., last 4 weeks).

demand_rate.label: Average Demand Satz (units/hour)
demand_rate.helper: Average customer demand Satz for the product family Durchflussing through the bottleneck.

bottleneck_capacity.label: Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
bottleneck_capacity.helper: Maximum theoretical output Satz des bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

investment_cost.label: Proposed Investment Kosten ($)
investment_cost.helper: Total capital expEndeeiture required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

expected_capacity_increase.label: Expected Capacity Increase (%)
expected_capacity_increase.helper: Expected procentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oproating Stunden pro Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned oproating Stunden des bottleneck resource pro year.

profit_margin_per_unit.label: Profit Margin pro Unit ($)
profit_margin_per_unit.helper: Contribution margin (revenue minus Variable Kosten) pro unit of product Durchflussing through the bottleneck.

quality_yield.label: Quality Yield at Bottleneck (%)
quality_yield.helper: First-pass yield (procentage of Gute Einheiten) at the bottleneck oproation.

maintenance_downtime_percent.label: Planned Maintenance Downtime (%)
maintenance_downtime_percent.helper: procentage of total oproating Zeit allocated to planned maintenance for the bottleneck.

risk_factor.label: Implementation Risk Factor
risk_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment des risk that the investment will not achieve the expected capacity increase.

fixedcosts.label: Total Fixed Kostens
fixedcosts.helper: Sum of all fixed expenses (Miete, salaries, insurance) pro proiod.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Kosten pro Unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Direct Material, labor, and overhead pro unit.

actualsalesvolume.label: Actual Sales Volumenn
actualsalesvolume.helper: Number of units actually sold in the proiod.

capacityvolume.label: Maximum Capacity Volumenn
capacityvolume.helper: Theoretical maximum output under normal oproating conditions.

demanduncertainty.label: Demand Uncertainty Factor
demanduncertainty.helper: Expected procentage variation in demand (coefficient of variation).

costescalationrate.label: Kosten Escalation Satz
costescalationrate.helper: Annual expected increase in Variable Kostens (inflation, supplier pricing).

includetax.label: Include Tax Effect
includetax.helper: If true, tax Satz Eingabe is required and after-tax break-even is calculated.

taxrate.label: Tax Satz
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoSatz tax Satz, verbraucht only when includeTax is true.

calibration_interval_days.label: Calibration Interval (Tage)
calibration_interval_days.helper: Standard calibration frequency pro ISO 17025 or manufacturer recommEndeeation.

days_since_last_calibration.label: Tage Since Last Calibration
days_since_last_calibration.helper: Actual elapsed Zeit since the most recent calibration event.

measurement_tolerance_pct.label: Measurement Tolerance (%)
measurement_tolerance_pct.helper: Maximum allowable deviation from nominal Wert, typically defined by process specs or Six Sigma limits.

observed_drift_pct.label: Observed Drift (%)
observed_drift_pct.helper: Measured deviation from nominal at last verification, expressed as procentage of full scale.

environmental_stress_factor.label: Environmental Stress Factor
environmental_stress_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment of temproature, humidity, vibration, and contamination effects on drift Satz.

criticality_level.label: Criticality Level
criticality_level.helper: Impact of measurement error on product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance (pro ISO 9001 risk-based thinking).

historical_failure_rate.label: Historical Failure Satz (pro 100 calibrations)
historical_failure_rate.helper: Number of times the instrument exceeded tolerance in the last 100 calibration events, verbraucht for reliability trEndeeing.

data_confidence_score.label: Data Confidence Score (0-100)
data_confidence_score.helper: Subjective or calculated measure of data quality based on measurement system analysis (MSA) pro AIAG MSA manual.

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic Satz (BMR) due to changes in lean body mass and hormonal factors.

gender.label: GEndeeer
gender.helper: GEndeeer influences BMR through Differenzs in body composition and hormonal profiles.

weight.label: Gewicht
weight.helper: Body Gewicht is a primary driver of Energie expEndeeiture and calorie needs.

height.label: Höhe
height.helper: Höhe is verbraucht in BMR equations to estimate lean body mass and metabolic Satz.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity multiplier adjusts TDEE based on occupational and exercise habits.

goalrate.label: Gewicht Loss Satz
goalrate.helper: Desired weekly Gewicht loss Satz deLaufzeitines the daily calorie deficit Sollwert.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat procentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional Eingabe for more accuSatz BMR estimation using the Katch-McArdle formula.

ispregnant.label: Pregnant
ispregnant.helper: Pregnancy increases Energie requirements; deficit is not recommEndeeed during pregnancy.

islactating.label: Lactating
islactating.helper: Lactation adds ~500 kcal/day to Energie needs; deficit must be adjusted.

electricity_kwh.label: Electricity Verbrauch
electricity_kwh.helper: Annual electricity usage from utility bills or submeters. Scope 2 emission source.

natural_gas_therms.label: Natural Gas Verbrauch
natural_gas_therms.helper: Annual natural gas usage from utility bills. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_diesel_liters.label: Diesel Kraftstoff Verbrauch (Fleet)
fuel_diesel_liters.helper: Annual diesel Verbrauch for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_gasoline_liters.label: Gasoline Kraftstoff Verbrauch (Fleet)
fuel_gasoline_liters.helper: Annual gasoline Verbrauch for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

waste_tonnes.label: Ausschuss GeneSatzd
waste_tonnes.helper: Total Ausschuss sent to landfill or incineration. Scope 3 emission source.

business_travel_km.label: Business Travel (Air & Rail)
business_travel_km.helper: Annual Entfernung traveled by Mitarbeiter for business purposes (air, rail). Scope 3 emission source.

region.label: Oproational Region
region.helper: Geographic region deLaufzeitines emission factors for electricity grid and Kraftstoff standards.

data_quality_score.label: Data Quality Score (1-5)
data_quality_score.helper: Subjective score of Eingabe data reliability: 1=estimated, 3=measured, 5=audited. verbraucht for confidence adjustment.

energy_consumption.label: Total Energie Verbrauch
energy_consumption.helper: Annual electrical Verbrauchte Energie by the facility (ISO 50001).

energy_source.label: Primary Energie Source
energy_source.helper: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).

fuel_consumption.label: Fossil Kraftstoff Verbrauch (Fleet & Heating)
fuel_consumption.helper: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil verbraucht annually (Scope 1 emissions).

waste_generated.label: Total Ausschuss GeneSatzd
waste_generated.helper: Annual Ausschuss sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).

recycling_rate.label: Recycling Satz
recycling_rate.helper: procentage of Ausschuss that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).

production_volume.label: Annual Production Volumenn
production_volume.helper: Total units produced pro year (for intensity-based benchmarking).

transport_distance.label: Average Transport Entfernung pro Unit
transport_distance.placeholder: Average Transport Entfernung pro Unit eingeben
transport_distance.helper: Average Entfernung raw Materials or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).

has_carbon_offset_program.label: Active Carbon Offset Program
has_carbon_offset_program.helper: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.

total_imported_tonnes.label: Total Imported Tonnes (steel/aluminum/cement/fertilizer/hydrogen)
total_imported_tonnes.helper: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting proiod.

embedded_emissions_per_tonne.label: Embedded Emissions pro Tonne
embedded_emissions_per_tonne.helper: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

carbon_price_origin.label: CO₂-Preis Paid in Country of Origin
carbon_price_origin.placeholder: CO₂-Preis Paid in Country of Origin eingeben
carbon_price_origin.helper: Effective CO₂-Preis already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

cbam_certificate_price.label: CBAM Certificate Preis (Strom auction)
cbam_certificate_price.helper: Latest weekly average auction Preis of CBAM certificates.

free_allocation_factor.label: Free Allocation Factor for Sector
free_allocation_factor.placeholder: Free Allocation Factor for Sector eingeben
free_allocation_factor.helper: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

verification_status.label: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
verification_status.placeholder: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions eingeben
verification_status.helper: Whether the embedded emissions data has been indepEndeeently verified by an accredited body.

compliance_deadline_met.label: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.placeholder: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted) eingeben
compliance_deadline_met.helper: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volumenn
annual_production_volume.helper: Total output des primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons pro year.

carbon_intensity.label: Carbon Intensity
carbon_intensity.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions pro ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

cbam_carbon_price.label: CBAM CO₂-Preis
cbam_carbon_price.helper: Expected or Strom EU ETS allowance Preis verbraucht for CBAM certificate calculation.

free_allocation_percentage.label: Free Allocation procentage
free_allocation_percentage.helper: procentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

production_efficiency_index.label: Production Efficiency Index
production_efficiency_index.helper: Gesamtanlageneffektivität (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher Werts reduce Ausschuss and emissions.

compliance_readiness_score.label: Compliance Readiness Score
compliance_readiness_score.helper: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness pro CBAM requirements.

industry_benchmark_intensity.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
industry_benchmark_intensity.helper: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

emission_scope.label: Emission Scope
emission_scope.helper: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

use_verified_data.label: Use Verified Data Only
use_verified_data.helper: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is verbraucht; otherwise estimated data may be included.

celsius_input.label: Temproature in Celsius
celsius_input.helper: Process temproature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.

sensor_accuracy.label: Sensor Accuracy (±°C)
sensor_accuracy.helper: Manufacturer-specified accuracy des temproature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).

calibration_offset.label: Calibration Offset
calibration_offset.helper: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).

unit_system.label: Sollwert Unit System
unit_system.helper: Wählen Sie output temproature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).

enable_alerts.label: Enable Process Alerts
enable_alerts.helper: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temproature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).

changeover_time_matrix.label: Changeover Zeit Matrix (minutes)
changeover_time_matrix.helper: Average Zeit to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

number_of_changeovers_per_month.label: Number of Changeovers pro Month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.placeholder: Number of Changeovers pro Month eingeben
number_of_changeovers_per_month.helper: Total changeovers proformed monthly across all shifts. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen total changeover downtime.

setup_external_time.label: External Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.placeholder: External Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover (minutes) eingeben
setup_external_time.helper: Rüstzeit activities that can be proformed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Sollwert for SMED optimization.

setup_internal_time.label: Internal Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.placeholder: Internal Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover (minutes) eingeben
setup_internal_time.helper: Rüstzeit activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary Sollwert for reduction via SMED.

product_family_count.label: Number of Product Families
product_family_count.helper: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

standard_deviation_changeover_time.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover Zeit (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.placeholder: Standard Deviation of Changeover Zeit (minutes) eingeben
standard_deviation_changeover_time.helper: Measure of variability in changeover times. verbraucht for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: Oproating schedule affecting available production Zeit and changeover frequency.

lean_smed_implemented.label: SMED Implementation Status
lean_smed_implemented.helper: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

target_changeover_time.label: Sollwert Changeover Zeit (minutes)
target_changeover_time.helper: SMED Sollwert for changeover Zeit reduction. Typically <10 minutes for world-class Leistung.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cutting_speed.helper: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed des cutting tool relative to workpiece.

tool_overhang.label: Tool Overhang (L)
tool_overhang.helper: ISO 3685: Free Länge of tool holder; affects stiffness.

tool_diameter.label: Tool Durchmesser (D)
tool_diameter.helper: ISO 3685: Cutter Durchmesser for milling or turning insert Durchmesser.

workpiece_material_hardness.label: Workpiece Material Hardness
workpiece_material_hardness.helper: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

machine_spindle_power.label: Machine Spindle Leistung (P_m)
machine_spindle_power.helper: ISO 841: Satzd Leistung des spindle motor.

machine_damping_ratio.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
machine_damping_ratio.helper: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

tool_material.label: Tool Material
tool_material.helper: ISO 513: Tool substSatz affects wear and stiffness.

coolant_application.label: Coolant Application
coolant_application.helper: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

total_sq_ft.label: Total Fläche (sq ft)
total_sq_ft.helper: Total cleanable Grundfläche in Quadratfuß. Basis for all labor and Material calculations.

cleaning_frequency.label: Cleaning Frequency pro Week
cleaning_frequency.helper: Number of times the facility is cleaned pro week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Satz ($/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

labor_burden_percent.label: Labor Burden (%)
labor_burden_percent.helper: procentage added to Labor Satz for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

productivity_sqft_per_hour.label: Productivity Satz (sq ft/hour)
productivity_sqft_per_hour.helper: Average Fläche cleaned pro proson pro hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

material_cost_per_sqft.label: Material Kosten ($/sq ft)
material_cost_per_sqft.helper: Kosten of cleaning chemicals, papro, and VerbrauchsMaterial pro square foot pro cleaning.

equipment_cost_per_sqft.label: Equipment Kosten ($/sq ft)
equipment_cost_per_sqft.helper: Amortized equipment Kosten (mops, vacuums, buffers) pro square foot pro cleaning.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead (%)
overhead_percent.helper: Indirect Kostens (management, office, insurance) as procentage of direct Kostens.

desired_margin_percent.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
desired_margin_percent.helper: Sollwert Nettoto profit margin on the bid.

waste_factor_percent.label: Ausschuss Factor (%)
waste_factor_percent.helper: Allowance for Material Ausschuss, rework, and inefficiency (Lean Six Sigma Ausschuss reduction).

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Service quality tier. Affects labor productivity and Material usage. Healthcare adds 15% to labor.

use_lean_methods.label: Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work)
use_lean_methods.placeholder: Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work) eingeben
use_lean_methods.helper: If true, applies 10% productivity improvement via Lean techniques.

api_call_volume.label: Monthly API Call Volumenn
api_call_volume.helper: Total number of API calls made pro month, including successful and overrun calls.

overrun_rate.label: Overrun Satz
overrun_rate.helper: procentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response Zeit threshold (e.g., >200ms).

avg_overrun_duration.label: Average Overrun Dauer
avg_overrun_duration.helper: Average extra Zeit beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

cost_per_call.label: Kosten pro API Call
cost_per_call.helper: Direct Kosten pro API call (compute, Nettotowork, storage).

retry_cost_per_call.label: Retry Kosten pro Call
retry_cost_per_call.helper: Additional Kosten incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

retry_rate.label: Retry Satz
retry_rate.helper: procentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

data_egress_gb.label: Monthly Data Egress
data_egress_gb.helper: Total data transferred out des cloud pro month.

egress_cost_per_gb.label: Egress Kosten pro GB
egress_cost_per_gb.helper: Kosten pro GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

sla_penalty_percentage.label: SLA Penalty procentage
sla_penalty_percentage.helper: procentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

monthly_service_fee.label: Monthly Service Fee
monthly_service_fee.helper: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

overrun_threshold_ms.label: Overrun Threshold (SLA)
overrun_threshold_ms.helper: Maximum acceptable response Zeit pro the SLA.

region.label: Cloud Region
region.helper: Geographic region des cloud service, affects egress Kostens and latency.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Kostens (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Include Hidden Kostens (e.g., opportunity loss) eingeben
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, adds estimated hidden Kostens like customer churn and brand impact.

total_cloud_spend.label: Total Cloud SpEndee (Monthly)
total_cloud_spend.helper: Total monthly cloud infrastructure Kosten across all services.

compute_utilization_rate.label: Average Compute Utilization Satz
compute_utilization_rate.helper: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

storage_waste_percentage.label: Storage Ausschuss procentage
storage_waste_percentage.helper: Estimated procentage of storage that is orphaned, unverbraucht, or over-provisioned.

idle_resource_count.label: Idle Resource Count
idle_resource_count.helper: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 Tage.

data_transfer_out_gb.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
data_transfer_out_gb.helper: Total outbound data transfer Volumenn pro month.

reserved_instance_coverage.label: Reserved Instance Deckkraft
reserved_instance_coverage.helper: procentage of compute spEndee covered by reserved or savings plans.

rightsizing_opportunity_score.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
rightsizing_opportunity_score.helper: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

cloud_provider.label: Cloud Provider
cloud_provider.helper: Primary cloud provider for Kosten analysis.

include_network_waste.label: Include Nettotowork Ausschuss Analysis
include_network_waste.helper: Toggle to include Nettotowork-related Ausschuss (e.g., data transfer, load balancer inefficiencies).

avg_order_value.label: Average Order Wert (AOV)
avg_order_value.helper: Mean revenue pro transaction. verbraucht in CLV calculation. Typical range: $20-$200 for B2C, $500-$5000 for B2B.

purchase_frequency.label: Purchase Frequency pro Year
purchase_frequency.helper: Number of purchases pro customer pro year. Derived from historical data or cohort analysis.

customer_lifetime_years.label: Customer Lifetime (Jahre)
customer_lifetime_years.helper: Average retention proiod. For subscription models, use 1/churn Satz.

gross_margin_pct.label: Gross Margin (%)
gross_margin_pct.helper: Profit margin after COGS. Typical range: 30-70% for product businesses, 60-90% for SaaS.

cac_total.label: Total Customer Acquisition Kosten (CAC)
cac_total.helper: Sum of all marketing and sales Kostens divided by number of new customers. Includes ad spEndee, salaries, tools.

retention_rate.label: Annual Retention Satz
retention_rate.helper: procentage of customers retained year over year. verbraucht for churn adjustment. Industry benchmark: 60-90%.

discount_rate.label: Rabatt Satz (Annual)
discount_rate.helper: Kosten of capital or required Satz of return. Typical range: 8-15%.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Subjective assessment of Eingabe data reliability. Low = estimates, High = audited data.

include_churn_adjustment.label: Include Churn Adjustment
include_churn_adjustment.helper: If true, uses retention Satz to adjust CLV for churn. RecommEndeeed for subscription models.

length_cm.label: Länge in Centimeters
length_cm.helper: Measured Länge in centimeters, typically from calipros, rulers, or CAD models.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty des measurement (e.g., ±0.05 cm for standard calipros).

conversion_precision.label: Conversion Precision
conversion_precision.helper: Wählen Sie conversion factor precision based on industry standard (ISO 80000-1, NIST).

tolerance_class.label: Tolerance Class
tolerance_class.helper: Tolerance class for dimensional Prüfung pro ISO 2768. Affects alert thresholds.

unit_cost_per_inch.label: Unit Kosten pro Inch
unit_cost_per_inch.helper: Kosten pro inch of Material or product, verbraucht for Kosten estimation in Lean/Six Sigma projects.

batch_quantity.label: Batch Menge
batch_quantity.helper: Number of units in the batch for Total Kosten and Ausschuss calculations.

material_type.label: Material Type
material_type.helper: Material selection directly impacts tool wear, cutting speed, and Kosten pro part.

part_weight_kg.label: Part Gewicht (kg)
part_weight_kg.helper: Gewicht des finished part, wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen raw Material Kosten and scrap.

stock_volume_cm3.label: Stock Volumenn (cm³)
stock_volume_cm3.helper: Volumenn of raw Material block before Bearbeitung, deLaufzeitines Material usage.

machining_time_min.label: Bearbeitung Zeit (minutes)
machining_time_min.helper: Total Taktzeit pro part including cutting, tool changes, and rapid moves.

setup_time_min.label: Rüstzeit Zeit (minutes)
setup_time_min.helper: Zeit to fixture, align, and program the machine for the batch.

batch_size.label: Batch Size (parts)
batch_size.helper: Number of identical parts produced in one production run.

machine_hourly_rate_usd.label: Machine Hourly Satz ($/hr)
machine_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Fully burdened machine Kosten including depreciation, maintenance, and Energie.

labor_hourly_rate_usd.label: Labor Hourly Satz ($/hr)
labor_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Oproator wage including overhead and benefits.

tooling_cost_per_part_usd.label: Tooling Kosten pro Part ($)
tooling_cost_per_part_usd.helper: Consumable tooling Kosten allocated pro part (inserts, drills, Endee mills).

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead procentage (%)
overhead_percentage.helper: Facility, quality, and administrative overhead as a procentage of direct Kostens.

scrap_rate_percent.label: Scrap Satz (%)
scrap_rate_percent.helper: procentage of parts that fail Prüfung and are scrapped.

material_cost_per_kg_usd.label: Material Kosten pro kg ($/kg)
material_cost_per_kg_usd.helper: Preis of raw Material pro kilogram, varies by Material type.

density_g_per_cm3.label: Dichte (g/cm³)
density_g_per_cm3.helper: Material Dichte verbraucht to convert Volumenn to Gewicht.

annual_manual_labor_cost.label: Annual Manual Labor Kosten (pro FTE)
annual_manual_labor_cost.placeholder: Annual Manual Labor Kosten (pro FTE) eingeben
annual_manual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual Kosten pro full-Zeit equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.

number_of_workers.label: Number of Workers Replaced
number_of_workers.helper: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.

cobot_purchase_price.label: Cobot Purchase Preis
cobot_purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expEndeeiture for the cobot including Endee-effector and controller.

cobot_annual_maintenance.label: Cobot Annual Maintenance Kosten
cobot_annual_maintenance.helper: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.

cobot_lifespan_years.label: Cobot Lifespan
cobot_lifespan_years.helper: Expected oproational life before major overhaul or replacement.

discount_rate.label: Rabatt Satz (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Gewichted average Kosten of capital for NPV calculation.

labor_productivity_factor.label: Manual Labor Productivity Factor
labor_productivity_factor.helper: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).

cobot_uptime_percent.label: Cobot Uptime
cobot_uptime_percent.helper: procentage of scheduled Zeit the cobot is oproational (excluding planned maintenance).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Number of shifts pro day the cobot will opeSatz (manual labor typically single shift).

include_training_cost.label: Include Cobot Training Kosten
include_training_cost.helper: Whether to include initial training and integration Kostens.

training_cost.label: Cobot Training & Integration Kosten
training_cost.helper: One-Zeit Kosten for programming, safety validation, and oproator training.

system_pressure.label: System Druck
system_pressure.helper: Oproating Druck des compressed air system; higher Druck increases leak Durchfluss Satz.

leak_diameter.label: Equivalent Leak Durchmesser
leak_diameter.helper: Durchmesser of a round orifice representing the average leak size. Common sizes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".

number_of_leaks.label: Number of Leaks
number_of_leaks.helper: Total number of identified or estimated leaks in the system.

operating_hours.label: Annual Oproating Stunden
operating_hours.helper: Total Stunden the compressor runs pro year. Continuous oproation = 8760 h.

electricity_cost.label: Electricity Kosten
electricity_cost.helper: Average blEndeeed Kosten of electricity pro kilowatt-hour.

compressor_efficiency.label: Compressor Efficiency
compressor_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency des compressor system (motor + drive + compressor). Typical range 70-85%.

leak_type.label: Leak Type
leak_type.helper: Geometry des leak affects discharge coefficient. Round orifice is most common.

include_maintenance_cost.label: Include Maintenance Kosten
include_maintenance_cost.helper: If true, adds estimated labor and Material Kosten for leak repair.

compressorflowrate.label: Kompressordurchfluss Satz
compressorflowrate.helper: Satzd free air delivery des compressor at standard conditions.

demandflowrate.label: Average Demand Durchfluss Satz
demandflowrate.helper: Average compressed air Verbrauch des system.

systempressure.label: System Oproating Druck
systempressure.helper: Nominal Druck at which the system opeSatzs.

pressuredifferential.label: Allowable Druck DiffeMieteial
pressuredifferential.helper: Maximum acceptable Druck drop during peak event.

compressorcontroltype.label: Compressor Control Type
compressorcontroltype.helper: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temproature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average ambient temproature at compressor location.

altitude.label: Altitude Above Sea Level
altitude.helper: Site elevation for air Dichte correction.

systemleakagepercent.label: System Leakage Estimate
systemleakagepercent.helper: Estimated procentage of compressed air lost to leaks.

applicationtype.label: Application Type
applicationtype.helper: Primary use case, influences safety factor.

container_type.label: Container Type
container_type.helper: Wählen Sie container type to define internal Volumenn and dimensional constraints pro ISO 668.

cargo_length_cm.label: Cargo Länge (cm)
cargo_length_cm.helper: Länge des primary cargo unit (pallet or box). Must align with container internal Länge.

cargo_width_cm.label: Cargo Breite (cm)
cargo_width_cm.helper: Breite des cargo unit. Affects lateral stacking and aisle space.

cargo_height_cm.label: Cargo Höhe (cm)
cargo_height_cm.helper: Höhe des cargo unit. Must respect container door Höhe and internal Höhe.

cargo_weight_kg.label: Cargo Gewicht pro Unit (kg)
cargo_weight_kg.helper: Gewicht pro cargo unit. Critical for gross Gewicht limit and axle load distribution.

stacking_factor.label: Stacking Factor
stacking_factor.helper: Number of cargo units that can be stacked vertically, considering crush resistance and stability.

load_secure_method.label: Load Securing Method
load_secure_method.helper: Method verbraucht to secure cargo. Affects usable Volumenn and Gewicht distribution pro CTU Code.

use_pallet.label: Use Pallet
use_pallet.helper: Indicates if cargo is palletized. Pallet dimensions add to base footprint and reduce usable Höhe.

pallet_height_cm.label: Pallet Höhe (cm)
pallet_height_cm.helper: Höhe des pallet (if verbraucht). Added to cargo Höhe for total unit Höhe.

actual_throughput.label: Actual Throughput (units)
actual_throughput.helper: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement proiod.

defect_rate.label: Defect Satz (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts pro million defective, measured pro Six Sigma standards.

on_time_delivery_percent.label: On-Zeit Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_percent.helper: procentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

cost_per_unit.label: Kosten pro Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Total manufacturing Kosten pro unit, including Materials, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: Sollwert Kosten pro Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Contractually agreed Kosten Sollwert pro unit.

incentive_base_rate.label: Incentive Base Satz ($/unit)
incentive_base_rate.helper: Base incentive Betrag pro unit, subject to Leistung multipliers.

quality_threshold_ppm.label: Quality Threshold (ppm)
quality_threshold_ppm.helper: Maximum defect Satz to qualify for any incentive.

delivery_threshold_percent.label: Delivery Threshold (%)
delivery_threshold_percent.helper: Minimum on-Zeit delivery procentage to qualify for incentive.

cost_reduction_sharing_percent.label: Kosten Reduction Sharing (%)
cost_reduction_sharing_percent.helper: procentage of Kosten savings shared as additional incentive.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of contract governing the incentive structure.

lean_certification_active.label: Lean Certification Active
lean_certification_active.helper: Indicates if the supplier holds an active Lean certification (e.g., ISO 18404).

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
cpk.helper: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical Sollwerts: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).

sigmashift.label: Sigma Shift (long-Laufzeit drift)
sigmashift.helper: Accounts for long-Laufzeit process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).

distributiontype.label: Distribution Type
distributiontype.helper: Wählen Sie distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.

samplesize.label: Sample Size (n)
samplesize.helper: Number of observations verbraucht to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Confidence level for the confidence interval des PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.

useconfidenceinterval.label: Use Confidence Interval
useconfidenceinterval.helper: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and uppro bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.

planned_duration_days.label: Planned Dauer (Tage)
planned_duration_days.helper: Total planned Dauer des project from Start to finish, as pro CPM schedule baseline.

actual_duration_days.label: Actual Dauer (Tage)
actual_duration_days.helper: Actual elapsed Dauer from project Start to Strom date or completion.

daily_penalty_rate.label: Daily Penalty Satz (Currency)
daily_penalty_rate.helper: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty pro day of delay beyond the planned Dauer.

critical_path_float_total.label: Total Float on Critical Path (Tage)
critical_path_float_total.placeholder: Total Float on Critical Path (Tage) eingeben
critical_path_float_total.helper: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. Werts below 0.8 indicate significant Ausschuss.

rework_percentage.label: Rework procentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: procentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.

delay_type.label: Delay Type
delay_type.helper: Classification pro standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).

use_earned_schedule.label: Use Earned Schedule Method
use_earned_schedule.helper: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accuSatz delay impact assessment.

expected_yield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
expected_yield.helper: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed geNettotoics and local potential.

actual_yield.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
actual_yield.helper: Measured yield at harvest, verbraucht as baseline for loss calculation.

harvest_loss_pct.label: Harvest Loss (%)
harvest_loss_pct.helper: procentage of crop lost during harvesting oproations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

post_harvest_loss_pct.label: Post-Harvest Loss (%)
post_harvest_loss_pct.helper: Losses during handling, storage, and Transport after harvest.

field_condition.label: Field Condition
field_condition.helper: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

irrigation_type.label: Irrigation Type
irrigation_type.helper: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

pest_pressure.label: Pest Druck (0-10)
pest_pressure.helper: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

disease_index.label: Disease Index (0-10)
disease_index.helper: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

weed_cover_pct.label: Weed Cover (%)
weed_cover_pct.helper: procentage of Field Fläche covered by weeds, competing for resources.

soil_quality_score.label: Soil Quality Score (0-100)
soil_quality_score.helper: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

labor_efficiency.label: Labor Efficiency (0-100)
labor_efficiency.helper: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field oproations.

equipment_reliability.label: Equipment Reliability (0-100)
equipment_reliability.helper: procentage of Zeit equipment opeSatzs without breakdown during critical proiods.

exposure_amount.label: Exposure Betrag (in base currency)
exposure_amount.helper: Total Wert of foreign currency receivables or payables subject to exchange Satz fluctuation.

volatility_annual.label: Annualized Volatility of Exchange Satz
volatility_annual.placeholder: Annualized Volatility of Exchange Satz eingeben
volatility_annual.helper: Historical or implied standard deviation of daily log returns annualized (ISO 31000 risk metric).

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level for VaR Calculation
confidence_level.placeholder: Confidence Level for VaR Calculation eingeben
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level verbraucht in Wert At Risk (VaR) estimation, typical Werts 90%, 95%, 99%.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio
hedge_ratio.helper: procentage of exposure covered by hedging instruments (forwards, options). Lean metric for Ausschuss reduction.

time_horizon_days.label: Zeit Horizon (Tage)
time_horizon_days.helper: Risk assessment proiod aligned with business planning cycles (WERC supply chain standard).

enable_lean_adjustment.label: Enable Lean Volatility Adjustment
enable_lean_adjustment.helper: Applies a Six Sigma-based correction factor to account for process variation in hedging execution.

cutvolume.label: Cut Volumenn
cutvolume.helper: Total Volumenn of Material to be excavated from cut Fläches, measured in bank cubic meters (BCM).

fillvolume.label: Fill Volumenn
fillvolume.helper: Total Volumenn of Material required for fill/embankment Fläches, measured in compacted cubic meters (CCM).

swellfactor.label: Swell Factor
swellfactor.helper: Factor accounting for Volumenn increase when Material is excavated (loose state vs. bank state). Typical range 1.1–1.4.

shrinkagefactor.label: Shrinkage Factor
shrinkagefactor.helper: Factor accounting for Volumenn decrease when Material is compacted (compacted state vs. bank state). Typical range 0.75–0.95.

hauldistance.label: Average Haul Entfernung
hauldistance.helper: Average one-way Entfernung from cut to fill Fläches, verbraucht for Kosten and Kraftstoff calculations.

unithaulcost.label: Unit Haul Kosten
unithaulcost.helper: Kosten pro cubic meter pro kilometer of hauling Material, including Kraftstoff, labor, and equipment depreciation.

wastedisposalcost.label: Ausschuss Disposal Kosten
wastedisposalcost.helper: Kosten pro cubic meter for disposing excess Material at a designated Ausschuss site.

borrowcost.label: Borrow Material Kosten
borrowcost.helper: Kosten pro cubic meter to import Material from a borrow pit to meet fill deficit.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Type of Material being moved, affects swell/shrinkage factors and handling difficulty.

useoptimizedhaulroutes.label: Use Optimized Haul Routes
useoptimizedhaulroutes.helper: If enabled, the tool applies lean logistics principles to minimize haul Entfernung and idle Zeit.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed
cutting_speed.helper: Surface speed des workpiece relative to the cutting tool, based on ISO 3685.

feed_rate.label: Feed Satz
feed_rate.helper: Linear Entfernung the tool advances pro revolution, affects chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.label: Tiefe of Cut
depth_of_cut.helper: Radial or axial engagement des tool, influences cutting forces and heat generation.

tool_material.label: Tool Material
tool_material.helper: Material des cutting tool, affects wear resistance and optimal cutting parameters.

workpiece_material.label: Workpiece Material
workpiece_material.helper: Material being machined, deLaufzeitines machinability rating and recommEndeeed speeds.

coolant_used.label: Coolant verbraucht
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is applied, reduces thermal stress and extEndees tool life.

machine_stability_factor.label: Machine Stability Factor
machine_stability_factor.helper: Factor representing machine rigidity and vibration damping, based on condition monitoring data.

milk_volume_liters.label: Milk Volumenn (Liters pro day)
milk_volume_liters.helper: Total raw milk received daily from suppliers or own herd.

fat_percentage.label: Fat Content (%)
fat_percentage.helper: Average butterfat content of incoming milk, critical for yield calculations.

protein_percentage.label: Protein Content (%)
protein_percentage.helper: Average protein content, affects cheese and powder yields.

selling_price_per_liter.label: Selling Preis (pro Liter)
selling_price_per_liter.helper: Average revenue pro liter of raw milk sold to processor or retail.

production_cost_per_liter.label: Production Kosten (pro Liter)
production_cost_per_liter.helper: Includes feed, labor, utilities, veterinary, and overhead pro liter.

waste_percentage.label: Ausschuss / Shrinkage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Milk lost due to spoilage, spillage, or quality rejection.

labor_hours_per_day.label: Labor Stunden pro Day
labor_hours_per_day.helper: Total direct Labor Stunden verbraucht in milk production and handling.

energy_cost_per_day.label: Energie Kosten (pro Day)
energy_cost_per_day.helper: Daily electricity, Kraftstoff, and cooling Kostens.

other_variable_cost_per_liter.label: Other Variable Kosten (pro Liter)
other_variable_cost_per_liter.helper: Supplies, additives, packaging, and miscellaneous Variable Kostens.

fixed_cost_per_day.label: Fixed Kosten (pro Day)
fixed_cost_per_day.helper: Depreciation, Miete, insurance, and other fixed overhead.

quality_grade.label: Quality Grade
quality_grade.helper: Milk quality grade based on somatic cell count and bacteria (A, B, C).

historical_demand_mean.label: Historical Demand Mean (units/proiod)
historical_demand_mean.helper: Average demand observed over the past 12 proiods (ISO 9001:2015 data collection).

demand_std_dev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units)
demand_std_dev.helper: Standard deviation of demand, verbraucht for safety stock calculation (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).

lead_time_days.label: Lead Zeit (Tage)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead Zeit from supplier (WERC DC Metrics).

service_level.label: Sollwert Service Level
service_level.helper: Probability of not stocking out during lead Zeit (Six Sigma DPMO Sollwert).

unit_cost.label: Unit Kosten ($)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase Kosten pro unit (ISO 14051 Material Durchfluss Kosten accounting).

holding_cost_rate.label: Annual Holding Kosten Satz (%)
holding_cost_rate.helper: procentage of unit Kosten pro year (WERC DC Measures, typical 20-30%).

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Kosten ($/order)
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed Kosten pro purchase order (Lean transactional Kosten reduction).

stockout_cost_per_unit.label: Stockout Kosten pro Unit ($)
stockout_cost_per_unit.helper: Lost profit + penalty pro unit of unmet demand (Six Sigma Kosten of poor quality).

periods_per_year.label: proiods pro Year
periods_per_year.helper: Number of demand proiods in a year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 52 for weekly).

use_abc_classification.label: Use ABC Classification
use_abc_classification.helper: If true, applies ABC analysis to adjust service level (Pareto principle in inventory management).

twin_scope.label: Digital Twin Scope
twin_scope.helper: Wählen Sie scope des digital twin: asset, process, system, or enterprise. Influences complexity and Kosten multipliers.

asset_count.label: Number of Assets/Entities
asset_count.helper: Total number of physical assets or entities to be modeled in the digital twin.

sensor_density.label: Sensor Dichte (sensors pro asset)
sensor_density.helper: Average number of IoT sensors pro asset. Higher Dichte increases data acquisition and processing Kostens.

data_frequency.label: Data Acquisition Frequency
data_frequency.helper: Frequency of data collection: 0.1 (every 10s), 1 (pro second), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Higher frequency increases data Volumenn and Kosten.

integration_complexity.label: Integration Complexity
integration_complexity.helper: Complexity of integrating with existing systems (ERP, MES, CMMS). Low, medium, high. Affects labor and software Kostens.

data_quality_index.label: Data Quality Index (DQI)
data_quality_index.helper: procentage of data that is accuSatz, complete, and timely. Based on ISO 8000 data quality standards.

labor_rate.label: Average Labor Satz (USD/hour)
labor_rate.helper: BlEndeeed hourly Satz for engineering and IT staff involved in digital twin development and maintenance.

expected_lifespan.label: Expected Lifespan (Jahre)
expected_lifespan.helper: Expected oproational lifespan des digital twin system. verbraucht for amortization and Total Kosten of ownership calculations.

lean_six_sigma_level.label: Lean Six Sigma Maturity Level
lean_six_sigma_level.placeholder: Lean Six Sigma Maturity Level eingeben
lean_six_sigma_level.helper: Organizational maturity in Lean Six Sigma: level1 (initial), level2 (managed), level3 (defined), level4 (quantitatively managed), level5 (optimizing). Affects efficiency and Ausschuss reduction.

werc_benchmark.label: WERC DC Benchmark (Kosten pro order)
werc_benchmark.placeholder: WERC DC Benchmark (Kosten pro order) eingeben
werc_benchmark.helper: Warehouse Education and Research Council (WERC) benchmark for average Kosten pro order in distribution centers.

planned_production_rate.label: Planned Production Satz
planned_production_rate.helper: The standard output Satz pro hour under normal oproating conditions (ISO 22400).

downtime_duration.label: DownZeitdauer
downtime_duration.helper: Total Dauer des unplanned downtime event.

revenue_per_unit.label: Revenue pro Unit
revenue_per_unit.helper: Selling Preis or standard Kosten pro unit of output.

direct_labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Kosten pro Hour
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Direct Labor Kosten pro Hour eingeben
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage including benefits for oproators affected by downtime.

energy_cost_per_hour.label: Energie Kosten pro Hour
energy_cost_per_hour.helper: Average Kosten of electricity, gas, or other Energie consumed during production.

scrap_rate_during_downtime.label: Scrap Satz During Downtime
scrap_rate_during_downtime.helper: procentage of Material Ausschussd due to reStart or instability after downtime (Six Sigma defect Satz).

recovery_time_factor.label: Recovery Zeit Factor
recovery_time_factor.helper: Multiplier for additional Zeit needed to return to steady-state production (Lean Takt Zeit recovery).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift during which downtime occurred; affects labor Kosten multipliers (night/weekEndee premiums).

include_quality_loss.label: Include Quality Loss
include_quality_loss.helper: If true, adds Kosten of scrap and rework caverbraucht by the downtime event.

dye_volume_l.label: Dye bath Volumenn (liters)
dye_volume_l.helper: Total Volumenn of dye liquor in the batch.

dye_concentration_gpl.label: Dye concentration (g/L)
dye_concentration_gpl.helper: Grams of dye powder pro liter of bath.

chemicals_per_liter.label: Auxiliary chemicals Kosten (USD/L)
chemicals_per_liter.helper: Kosten of salts, acids, bases, etc., pro liter of bath.

energy_cost_per_batch.label: Energie Kosten pro batch (USD)
energy_cost_per_batch.helper: Electricity, steam, or gas Kosten for heating and running the dyeing machine.

batch_time_hours.label: Batch Taktzeit (Stunden)
batch_time_hours.helper: Total Zeit from loading to unloading.

waste_percentage.label: Ausschuss / rework Satz (%)
waste_percentage.helper: procentage of batches that require re-dyeing or are scrapped.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water Kosten (USD/m³)
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Kosten of fresh water and Ausschusswater treatment.

water_usage_l_per_kg.label: Wasserverbrauch (L/kg fabric)
water_usage_l_per_kg.helper: Typical water Verbrauch pro kg of fabric processed.

fabric_weight_kg.label: Fabric Gewicht (kg)
fabric_weight_kg.helper: Gewicht of fabric in the batch.

dye_type.label: Dye class
dye_type.helper: Chemical class of dye, affects fixation efficiency and Kosten.

use_lean_optimization.label: Enable Lean optimization (reduce Ausschuss)
use_lean_optimization.helper: If true, applies lean principles to reduce Ausschuss and rework.

total_energy_kwh.label: Total Energie Verbrauch (kWh)
total_energy_kwh.helper: Total electrical Energie consumed by the facility over the reporting proiod (e.g., monthly).

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest recorded Leistung demand during the proiod; verbraucht for demand charge calculation.

tariff_rate_per_kwh.label: Energie Satz ($/kWh)
tariff_rate_per_kwh.helper: Average Kosten pro kWh from utility bill (blEndeeed Satz).

demand_charge_per_kw.label: Demand Charge ($/kW)
demand_charge_per_kw.helper: Utility demand charge pro kW of peak demand.

production_units.label: Total Production Units
production_units.helper: Number of units produced in the proiod (e.g., pieces, kg, liters).

facility_type.label: Facility Type
facility_type.helper: Type of facility for benchmarking and normalization.

include_renewable_offset.label: Include Renewable Energie Offset
include_renewable_offset.helper: If true, subtracts renewable generation from total Verbrauch for Nettoto Kosten calculation.

renewable_kwh.label: Renewable Energie GeneSatzd (kWh)
renewable_kwh.helper: On-site renewable generation (solar, wind) during the proiod.

co2_emission_factor.label: CO2 Emission Factor (kg CO2/kWh)
co2_emission_factor.helper: Grid average emission factor for the region (ISO 14064).

waste_type.label: Ausschuss Type
waste_type.helper: Wählen Sie category of Ausschuss to apply appropriate Kosten factors and regulatory thresholds.

waste_volume_kg.label: Ausschuss Volumenn (kg)
waste_volume_kg.helper: Total mass of Ausschuss geneSatzd in the reporting proiod.

disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Disposal Kosten pro kg
disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Average Kosten paid to Ausschuss management vEndeeor pro kilogram.

transport_distance_km.label: Transport Entfernung (km)
transport_distance_km.helper: One-way Entfernung from facility to disposal or recycling site.

transport_cost_per_km.label: Transport Kosten pro km
transport_cost_per_km.helper: Kosten pro kilometer for Ausschuss Transport, including Kraftstoff and labor.

labor_hours_per_ton.label: Labor Stunden pro Ton
labor_hours_per_ton.helper: Direct Labor Stunden required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of Ausschuss.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Satz pro Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage including overhead for Ausschuss handling prosonnel.

recycling_revenue_per_kg.label: Recycling Revenue pro kg
recycling_revenue_per_kg.helper: Revenue received from selling recyclable Materials pro kilogram.

recycling_rate.label: Recycling Satz (%)
recycling_rate.helper: procentage of total Ausschuss that is diverted to recycling.

carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.label: Carbon Kosten pro kg CO2e
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.placeholder: Carbon Kosten pro kg CO2e eingeben
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.helper: Internal or regulatory Kosten assigned to each kg of CO2 equivalent emissions.

emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e/kg Ausschuss)
emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.helper: Average greenhouse gas emissions pro kilogram of Ausschuss based on Ausschuss type and disposal method.

compliance_penalty_per_kg.label: Compliance Penalty pro kg
compliance_penalty_per_kg.helper: Potential regulatory fines or penalties pro kilogram if Ausschuss exceeds promitted limits.

waste_volume_limit_kg.label: Ausschuss Volumenn Limit (kg)
waste_volume_limit_kg.helper: Regulatory or internal threshold for Ausschuss Volumenn before penalties apply.

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annual_demand.helper: Total forecasted demand for the item over one year. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen order frequency and total cycle stock.

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Kosten pro Order
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed Kosten incurred pro purchase order (e.g., administrative, Prüfung, Transportation Rüstzeit).

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding Kosten pro Unit pro Year
holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Holding Kosten pro Unit pro Year eingeben
holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Kosten to hold one unit in inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence, and capital Kosten.

unit_cost.label: Unit Kosten (Purchase Preis)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase Preis pro unit from supplier. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen total annual purchase Kosten and capital tied up.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Zeit (Tage)
lead_time_days.helper: Average Zeit from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point calculations.

demand_variability.label: Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand)
demand_variability.placeholder: Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand) eingeben
demand_variability.helper: Standard deviation of daily demand. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen safety stock under uncertainty (Six Sigma approach).

service_level.label: Desired Service Level
service_level.helper: Sollwert probability of not stocking out during lead Zeit. Higher service levels increase safety stock.

backorder_cost.label: Backorder Kosten pro Unit
backorder_cost.helper: Kosten incurred pro unit when demand cannot be met from stock (lost sales, penalty, expediting).

warehouse_capacity.label: Warehouse Capacity (units)
warehouse_capacity.helper: Maximum storage capacity available for this item. verbraucht to constrain order Menge if EOQ exceeds capacity.

storage_cost_per_sqft.label: Storage Kosten pro sq ft pro Year
storage_cost_per_sqft.placeholder: Storage Kosten pro sq ft pro Year eingeben
storage_cost_per_sqft.helper: Kosten pro square foot of warehouse space pro year. verbraucht for space-based holding Kosten adjustments.

item_footprint.label: Item Footprint (sq ft pro unit)
item_footprint.placeholder: Item Footprint (sq ft pro unit) eingeben
item_footprint.helper: Average floor space required pro unit of inventory. verbraucht to compute space Kosten component.

bac.label: Budget at Completion
bac.helper: Total authorized budget for the work scope (PMBOK).

ev.label: Earned Wert
ev.helper: Wert of work actually proformed, measured in budgeted Kosten.

ac.label: Actual Kosten
ac.helper: Total Kosten incurred for the work proformed.

pv.label: Planned Wert
pv.helper: Authorized budget for the work scheduled to be completed.

percentcomplete.label: procent Complete (physical)
percentcomplete.helper: Objective physical progress estimate (e.g., via earned Wert rules).

cpi.label: Kosten Leistung Index (override)
cpi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated CPI. CPI = EV/AC.

spi.label: Schedule Leistung Index (override)
spi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated SPI. SPI = EV/PV.

useweightedmethod.label: Use Gewichted CPI/SPI for EAC
useweightedmethod.placeholder: Use Gewichted CPI/SPI for EAC eingeben
useweightedmethod.helper: If true, applies 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI Gewichting for EAC (industry practice).
