managementreserve.helper: Reserve held for unforeseen scope changes (not part of BAC).

fabric_width.label: Fabric Breite (cm)
fabric_width.helper: Standard industrial fabric roll Breite, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.

fabric_length.label: Fabric Länge (m)
fabric_length.helper: Total Länge of fabric roll or batch, verbraucht to compute total Fläche.

pattern_length.label: Pattern Länge (cm)
pattern_length.helper: Länge of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.

pattern_width.label: Pattern Breite (cm)
pattern_width.helper: Breite of one pattern piece propEndeeicular to the grain.

quantity.label: Menge to Cut
quantity.helper: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.

cutting_method.label: Cutting Method
cutting_method.helper: Method affects Material utilization and labor Kosten. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.

material_cost_per_m2.label: Material Kosten pro m²
material_cost_per_m2.helper: Kosten of fabric pro square meter, verbraucht for financial loss calculations.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Satz pro Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage of cutting oproator, verbraucht for labor Kosten estimation.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance procentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Extra fabric allowance for seam, shrinkage, or alignment tolerances pro ISO 4915.

use_nesting.label: Enable Nesting Optimization
use_nesting.helper: If true, the optimizer will attempt to nest patterns to reduce Ausschuss.

num_departments.label: Number of Departments
num_departments.helper: Total distinct production or storage Fläches in the facility.

flow_intensity_matrix.label: Durchfluss Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaSatzd pro row)
flow_intensity_matrix.placeholder: Durchfluss Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaSatzd pro row) eingeben
flow_intensity_matrix.helper: Number of Material movements between each pair of departments pro day.

distance_matrix.label: Entfernung Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaSatzd pro row)
distance_matrix.placeholder: Entfernung Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaSatzd pro row) eingeben
distance_matrix.helper: Strom or proposed travel Entfernungs between department centroids.

path_efficiency_factor.label: Path Efficiency Factor
path_efficiency_factor.helper: Ratio of straight-line Entfernung to actual travel path (1.0 = profect straight line).

layout_type.label: Layout Type
layout_type.helper: Classification des facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.

use_weighted_distance.label: Use Gewichted Entfernung (Durchfluss × Entfernung)
use_weighted_distance.helper: If true, the primary Ergebnis is the sum of Durchfluss × Entfernung; otherwise raw Entfernung sum.

recycling_machine_cost.label: Recycling Machine Purchase Kosten
recycling_machine_cost.helper: Capital expEndeeiture for the recycling extruder/pelletizer system.

machine_life_years.label: Machine Nutzungsdauer
machine_life_years.helper: Expected oproational life before major overhaul or replacement.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Kosten
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Routine maintenance, spare parts, and service contracts.

recycling_energy_consumption.label: Recycling Energie Verbrauch
recycling_energy_consumption.helper: Energie required pro kg of recycled filament produced.

labor_rate.label: Labor Satz
labor_rate.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for oproator.

labor_hours_per_kg.label: Labor Stunden pro kg
labor_hours_per_kg.helper: Direct labor Zeit to process one kg of recycled filament.

waste_collection_cost.label: Ausschuss Collection Kosten
waste_collection_cost.helper: Kosten to collect and Transport scrap plastic to recycling facility.

virgin_filament_price.label: Virgin Filament Market Preis
virgin_filament_price.helper: Strom market Preis for virgin PLA/ABS/PETG filament.

recycling_yield.label: Recycling Yield
recycling_yield.helper: procentage of Eingabe Ausschuss that becomes usable filament (losses due to contamination, degradation).

quality_factor.label: Quality Factor (vs Virgin)
quality_factor.helper: Relative mechanical/print quality of recycled filament compared to virgin (e.g., 90% means 10% more Material needed for same strength).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volumenn
annual_production_volume.helper: Total kg of recycled filament produced pro year.

waste_type.label: Ausschuss Type
waste_type.helper: Type of plastic Ausschuss being recycled; affects processing parameters and yield.

include_carbon_cost.label: Include Carbon Kosten
include_carbon_cost.helper: If true, adds a carbon penalty Kosten based on estimated emissions.

carbon_price.label: CO₂-Preis
carbon_price.helper: Social Kosten of carbon or carbon tax pro metric ton of CO2 equivalent.

static_pressure.label: Static Druck
static_pressure.helper: Measured at hydrant outlet with no Durchfluss. verbraucht to deLaufzeitine available system Druck pro NFPA 291.

residual_pressure.label: Residual Druck
residual_pressure.helper: Druck measured while hydrant is Durchflussing at test Satz. Indicates system capacity under demand.

flow_rate_test.label: Test Durchfluss Satz
flow_rate_test.helper: Durchfluss Satz measured during hydrant Durchfluss test using pitot gauge or Durchfluss meter.

pipe_diameter.label: Supply Pipe Durchmesser
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal Durchmesser des main supply pipe feeding the hydrant. Affects friction loss.

pipe_length.label: Supply Pipe Länge
pipe_length.helper: Entfernung from water main to hydrant. verbraucht in friction loss calculations.

hazen_williams_coefficient.label: Hazen-Williams C Factor
hazen_williams_coefficient.helper: Pipe roughness coefficient. 140 for new steel, 100 for old cast iron. pro ISO 10803 and NFPA 13.

elevation_difference.label: Elevation Differenz
elevation_difference.helper: Höhe Differenz between water source and hydrant. Positive if hydrant is above source.

number_of_hydrants.label: Number of Hydrants in Test
number_of_hydrants.placeholder: Number of Hydrants in Test eingeben
number_of_hydrants.helper: Number of hydrants Durchflussing simultaneously during test. Affects total demand.

hydrant_type.label: Hydrant Type
hydrant_type.helper: Type of hydrant pro NFPA 291. Dry barrel common in cold climates.

flow_condition.label: Durchfluss Condition
flow_condition.helper: Steady for normal tests, Transient for surge analysis pro ISO 4126.

is_test_standard.label: NFPA 291 Compliant Test
is_test_standard.helper: Indicates if Durchfluss test was proformed pro NFPA 291 standard procedures.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volumenn
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced pro year across all product variants.

avg_batch_size.label: Average Batch Size
avg_batch_size.helper: Average number of units produced pro production run before changeover.

current_setup_time.label: Strom Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover
current_setup_time.placeholder: Strom Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover eingeben
current_setup_time.helper: Zeit required to change from one product to another in the Strom system.

target_setup_time.label: Sollwert Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover (after FMS)
target_setup_time.placeholder: Sollwert Rüstzeit Zeit pro Changeover (after FMS) eingeben
target_setup_time.helper: Expected Rüstzeit Zeit after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

hourly_operating_cost.label: Hourly Oproating Kosten (labor + overhead)
hourly_operating_cost.helper: Fully burdened hourly Kosten of production labor and overhead.

changeover_cost_per_hour.label: Changeover Kosten pro Hour (downtime + labor)
changeover_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Changeover Kosten pro Hour (downtime + labor) eingeben
changeover_cost_per_hour.helper: Total Kosten incurred pro hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

inventory_holding_cost_rate.label: Inventory Holding Kosten Satz
inventory_holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual Kosten to hold inventory as a procentage of inventory Wert (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory Wert (Strom)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Strom average Wert of raw Materials, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

fms_investment.label: Total FMS Investment
fms_investment.helper: Total capital expEndeeiture for flexible manufacturing system (equipment, software, training, integration).

fms_useful_life.label: FMS Nutzungsdauer
fms_useful_life.helper: Expected oproational life des flexible manufacturing system for depreciation purposes.

discount_rate.label: Rabatt Satz (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Gewichted average Kosten of capital verbraucht for Nettoto present Wert calculation.

product_variants.label: Number of Product Variants
product_variants.helper: Total number of distinct product variants produced annually.

quality_defect_rate.label: Strom Quality Defect Satz
quality_defect_rate.helper: procentage of units that are defective and require rework or scrap.

fms_quality_improvement.label: Expected Quality Improvement from FMS
fms_quality_improvement.placeholder: Expected Quality Improvement from FMS eingeben
fms_quality_improvement.helper: Expected procentage reduction in defect Satz after implementing FMS.

cost_per_defect.label: Kosten pro Defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Kosten to rework or scrap a defective unit.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gewinn from FMS
labor_productivity_gain.placeholder: Labor Productivity Gewinn from FMS eingeben
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Expected procentage increase in labor productivity due to automation and reduced manual handling.

floor_space_reduction.label: Floor Space Reduction
floor_space_reduction.helper: Expected procentage reduction in manufacturing floor space due to compact FMS layout.

annual_floor_space_cost.label: Annual Floor Space Kosten pro sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.placeholder: Annual Floor Space Kosten pro sq ft eingeben
annual_floor_space_cost.helper: Annual Kosten pro square foot of manufacturing space (Miete, utilities, maintenance).

current_floor_space.label: Strom Floor Space
current_floor_space.helper: Total manufacturing floor space Stromly occupied.

energy_cost_reduction.label: Energie Kosten Reduction from FMS
energy_cost_reduction.placeholder: Energie Kosten Reduction from FMS eingeben
energy_cost_reduction.helper: Expected procentage reduction in Energie Kostens due to more efficient equipment and reduced idle Zeit.

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Energie Kosten
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual Energie Kosten for the manufacturing facility.

maintenance_cost_increase.label: Maintenance Kosten Increase from FMS
maintenance_cost_increase.placeholder: Maintenance Kosten Increase from FMS eingeben
maintenance_cost_increase.helper: Expected procentage increase in maintenance Kostens due to more complex equipment.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Kosten (Strom)
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Strom annual maintenance Kosten for existing equipment.

training_cost.label: Training Kosten for FMS
training_cost.helper: One-Zeit Kosten for training oproators and maintenance staff on the new FMS.

implementation_time.label: Implementation Zeit
implementation_time.helper: Zeit required to fully implement the flexible manufacturing system.

production_days_per_year.label: Production Tage pro Year
production_days_per_year.helper: Number of Tage the facility opeSatzs pro year.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts pro Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts pro day.

total_production_kg.label: Total Production (kg)
total_production_kg.helper: Total Gewicht of finished goods produced in the reporting proiod (ISO 14051 Material Durchfluss).

waste_kg.label: Ausschuss (kg)
waste_kg.helper: Total Gewicht of Lebensmittel Ausschuss geneSatzd (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).

selling_price_per_kg.label: Selling Preis pro kg
selling_price_per_kg.helper: Average revenue pro kg of finished product sold (Nettoto of Rabatts).

cost_per_kg.label: Kosten pro kg
cost_per_kg.helper: Total Variable Kosten pro kg (raw Materials, labor, Energie, packaging).

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Ausschuss Disposal Kosten pro kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.placeholder: Ausschuss Disposal Kosten pro kg eingeben
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Kosten to dispose of Ausschuss (landfill, composting, incineration).

rework_percentage.label: Rework procentage
rework_percentage.helper: procentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect Satz).

labor_hourly_rate.label: Labor Hourly Satz
labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor Kosten pro hour (including benefits).

rework_hours_per_kg.label: Rework Stunden pro kg
rework_hours_per_kg.helper: Average Labor Stunden required to rework one kg of product.

storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.label: Storage Kosten pro kg pro Day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.placeholder: Storage Kosten pro kg pro Day eingeben
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.helper: Kosten to store one kg of product pro day (WERC warehousing metrics).

average_storage_days.label: Average Storage Tage
average_storage_days.helper: Average number of Tage Ausschuss is held before disposal or rework.

waste_type.label: Ausschuss Type
waste_type.helper: Primary category of Ausschuss (ISO 14051 Ausschuss classification).

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Kostens (Energie, Water, Overhead)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Include Hidden Kostens (Energie, Water, Overhead) eingeben
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, allocates a portion of fixed overhead to Ausschuss (activity-based Kostening).

numerator.label: Numerator
numerator.helper: The top part des fraction (dividEndee). For mixed numbers, use the fractional part only.

denominator.label: Denominator
denominator.helper: The bottom part des fraction (Divisor). Must be non-zero.

wholenumber.label: Whole Number (for mixed fractions)
wholenumber.helper: Integer part of a mixed number (e.g., 3 in 3 1/4). Set to 0 for propro fractions.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places (precision)
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the Ergebnis. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

roundingmethod.label: Rounding Method
roundingmethod.helper: Rounding rule pro ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommEndeeed for statistical work).

uncertaintyinput.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±)
uncertaintyinput.helper: Absolute uncertainty in the numerator (e.g., from measurement tolerance). verbraucht for Six Sigma uncertainty propagation.

planned_distance_km.label: Planned Route Entfernung
planned_distance_km.helper: Total Entfernung des planned route as pro logistics plan.

actual_distance_km.label: Actual Route Entfernung
actual_distance_km.helper: Total Entfernung actually driven, including deviations.

fuel_consumption_rate.label: Average Kraftstoff Verbrauch Satz
fuel_consumption_rate.helper: Vehicle Kraftstoff Verbrauch Satz under standard conditions (ISO 14040).

fuel_price_per_liter.label: Kraftstoff Preis pro Liter
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: Strom market Preis of diesel or gasoline pro liter.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load Gewicht
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total Gewicht of cargo carried, affects Kraftstoff Verbrauch.

terrain_factor.label: Terrain Type
terrain_factor.helper: Terrain classification affecting Kraftstoff efficiency (WERC guidelines).

traffic_condition.label: Traffic Condition
traffic_condition.helper: Traffic Dichte impact on Kraftstoff Verbrauch and route drift.

driver_behavior_score.label: Driver Behavior Score
driver_behavior_score.helper: Eco-driving score based on acceleration, braking, idling (Lean Six Sigma metric).

vehicle_age_years.label: Vehicle Age
vehicle_age_years.helper: Age des vehicle, verbraucht for efficiency degradation factor.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Loss Drivers
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include secondary loss factors like tire Druck, engine wear, etc.

defect_rate.label: Defect Satz (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts pro million defective – Six Sigma quality metric. Lower is better.

throughput.label: Throughput (units/hour)
throughput.helper: Actual production Satz pro hour. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen OEE and capacity utilization.

planned_throughput.label: Planned Throughput (units/hour)
planned_throughput.helper: Sollwert production Satz pro hour. Must be >0 to avoid division by zero.

cost_per_unit.label: Kosten pro Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Direct manufacturing Kosten pro unit. Includes Material, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: Sollwert Kosten pro Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Budgeted or standard Kosten pro unit. Must be >0.

safety_incidents.label: Safety Incidents (last 12 months)
safety_incidents.helper: Total recordable incidents pro year. Lower is better (ISO 45001).

on_time_delivery_pct.label: On-Zeit Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_pct.helper: procentage of orders delivered on or before promised date. WERC metric.

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift pattern affects fatigue and error Satzs. verbraucht in safety adjustment.

oee_override.label: Override OEE Calculation?
oee_override.helper: If true, user can manually enter OEE instead of computing from throughput.

deviation_type.label: Deviation Type
deviation_type.helper: Wählen Sie category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate Kosten multipliers and regulatory thresholds.

affected_batch_kg.label: Affected Batch Gewicht (kg)
affected_batch_kg.helper: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen Material loss and rework Kostens.

unit_cost_per_kg.label: Unit Kosten pro kg ($)
unit_cost_per_kg.helper: Standard Kosten of raw Materials pro kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

rework_percentage.label: Rework procentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Estimated fraction des affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

rework_cost_per_kg.label: Rework Kosten pro kg ($)
rework_cost_per_kg.helper: Additional Kosten pro kilogram for rework activities (labor, Energie, extra Materials).

downtime_hours.label: Downtime (Stunden)
downtime_hours.helper: Total production downtime caverbraucht by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

hourly_overhead_rate.label: Hourly Overhead Satz ($/hr)
hourly_overhead_rate.helper: Burdened overhead Kosten pro hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility Kostens).

regulatory_penalty_flag.label: Regulatory Penalty Applicable?
regulatory_penalty_flag.helper: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

base_penalty_amount.label: Base Penalty Betrag ($)
base_penalty_amount.helper: Estimated Grundbußgeld or penalty if regulatory action is taken. verbraucht only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

recall_cost_flag.label: Recall Kosten Included?
recall_cost_flag.helper: Check if the deviation requires a product recall, adding logistics, testing, and brand damage Kostens.

recall_fixed_cost.label: Recall Fixed Kosten ($)
recall_fixed_cost.helper: Fixed Kosten associated with initiating a recall (notification, logistics, testing).

recall_variable_per_kg.label: Recall Variable Kosten pro kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.placeholder: Recall Variable Kosten pro kg ($/kg) eingeben
recall_variable_per_kg.helper: pro-kilogram Kosten for recall handling (Transport, disposal, replacement).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
data_confidence.helper: Subjective confidence in the accuracy of Eingabe data (0 = low, 1 = high). verbraucht to adjust the final Kosten estimate.

design_ua.label: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Fläche (UA_design)
design_ua.placeholder: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Fläche (UA_design) eingeben
design_ua.helper: Clean design UA from manufacturer datasheet or initial commissioning test (ISO 50001:2018, Annex B).

actual_ua.label: Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Fläche (UA_actual)
actual_ua.placeholder: Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Fläche (UA_actual) eingeben
actual_ua.helper: Strom measured UA from process data (temproature, Durchfluss) using heat balance. Indicates fouling severity.

hot_inlet_temp.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temproature
hot_inlet_temp.helper: Temproature of hot process stream entering the heat exchanger.

cold_inlet_temp.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temproature
cold_inlet_temp.helper: Temproature of cooling or heating utility entering the exchanger.

hot_flow_rate.label: Hot Fluid Mass Durchfluss Satz
hot_flow_rate.placeholder: Hot Fluid Mass Durchfluss Satz eingeben
hot_flow_rate.helper: Mass Durchfluss Satz des hot process stream.

hot_specific_heat.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity
hot_specific_heat.placeholder: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity eingeben
hot_specific_heat.helper: Average specific heat of hot fluid over oproating temproature range.

energy_cost.label: Energie Kosten
energy_cost.helper: Kosten of thermal Energie (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oproating Stunden pro Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual oproating Stunden des heat exchanger.

production_loss_factor.label: Production Loss Factor
production_loss_factor.helper: procentage of production capacity lost due to reduced heat transfer (e.g., slower throughput).

revenue_per_unit_product.label: Revenue pro Unit Product
revenue_per_unit_product.helper: Revenue geneSatzd pro kg of product processed through the exchanger.

exchanger_type.label: Heat Exchanger Type
exchanger_type.helper: Type of heat exchanger; affects fouling factors and cleaning intervals.

fouling_factor_known.label: Fouling Factor Known?
fouling_factor_known.helper: If true, user provides measured fouling factor directly; otherwise calculated from UA ratio.

measured_fouling_factor.label: Measured Fouling Factor (R_f)
measured_fouling_factor.helper: Directly measured fouling resistance from test or literature (TEMA standards).

horsepower.label: HorseLeistung (HP)
horsepower.helper: Mechanical Leistung rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.

hp_type.label: HorseLeistung Type
hp_type.helper: DiffeMiete horseLeistung definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency des motor at Satzd load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

load_factor.label: Lastfaktor
load_factor.helper: procentage of Satzd load at which the motor opeSatzs. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.

power_factor.label: Leistung Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real Leistung to appaMiete Leistung. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oproating Stunden pro Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual Laufzeit for Energie Kosten calculations. Common Werts: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Kosten
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average industrial electricity Satz. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.

cooling_load.label: Cooling Load
cooling_load.helper: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

heating_load.label: Heating Load
heating_load.helper: Total Wärmeverlust from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temproature
ambient_temperature.helper: Outdoor dry-bulb temproature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

relative_humidity.label: Relative Humidity
relative_humidity.helper: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil Leistung.

efficiency_ratio.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
efficiency_ratio.helper: Strom system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

airflow_rate.label: AirDurchfluss Satz
airflow_rate.helper: Supply air Volumenn, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

duct_leakage_factor.label: Duct Leakage Factor
duct_leakage_factor.helper: Estimated leakage as procentage of total airDurchfluss; affects effective capacity.

occupancy_density.label: Occupancy Dichte
occupancy_density.helper: People pro square meter, impacts internal heat Gewinn (ASHRAE 62.1).

is_preventive_maintenance_active.label: Preventive Maintenance Active
is_preventive_maintenance_active.helper: Indicates if PM schedule is followed; affects degradation factor.

flow_rate.label: Durchfluss Satz
flow_rate.helper: Volumenntric Durchfluss Satz of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.

pressure_drop_total.label: Total Druck Drop
pressure_drop_total.helper: Sum of all Druck losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommEndees measurement at steady state.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Dichte
fluid_density.helper: Dichte of hydraulic fluid at oproating temproature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.

kinematic_viscosity.label: Kinematic Viscosity
kinematic_viscosity.helper: Fluid viscosity at oproating temproature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.

pipe_length.label: Total Pipe Länge
pipe_length.helper: Total Länge of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Durchmesser
pipe_diameter.helper: Inner Durchmesser des main hydraulic pipe. Affects Durchfluss velocity and Reynolds number.

valve_count.label: Number of Valves
valve_count.helper: Total number of directional, Druck, and Durchfluss control valves in the system.

fitting_count.label: Number of Fittings
fitting_count.helper: Total number of elbows, tees, reducers, and other fittings.

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: Application type influences typical loss factors and maintenance intervals.

is_new_system.label: New System (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.placeholder: New System (less than 1 year in service) eingeben
is_new_system.helper: New systems may have diffeMiete loss characteristics due to break-in proiod.

base_cost.label: Base Kosten (Strom proiod)
base_cost.helper: Total Kosten of goods or services at the Start des analysis proiod.

inflation_rate.label: Annual Inflation Satz
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation Satz for the Kosten category (e.g., CPI, PPI).

period_years.label: Analysis proiod (Jahre)
period_years.helper: Number of Jahre over which inflation escalation is calculated.

escalation_method.label: Escalation Method
escalation_method.helper: Method to apply inflation: compound (annual compounding), simple (linear), or stepwise (discrete annual steps).

include_energy.label: Include Energie Kosten Escalation
include_energy.helper: If true, applies a sepaSatz Energie escalation factor (typically higher than general inflation).

energy_escalation_rate.label: Energie Escalation Satz
energy_escalation_rate.helper: Annual escalation Satz for Energie Kostens, often based on EIA forecasts.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gewinn
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Annual productivity improvement that offsets labor Kosten inflation (Lean / Six Sigma metric).

material_volatility_index.label: Material Volatility Index
material_volatility_index.helper: Multiplier to adjust Material inflation based on commodity volatility (e.g., coppro, steel).

current_rate.label: Strom Interest Satz (%)
current_rate.helper: The prevailing market interest Satz for the reference proiod.

rate_change.label: Expected Satz Change (bps)
rate_change.helper: Anticipated shift in interest Satz in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).

portfolio_value.label: Portfolio Wert (USD)
portfolio_value.helper: Total notional Wert des fixed-income portfolio.

duration.label: Modified Dauer (Jahre)
duration.helper: Sensitivity of bond Preis to yield changes, adjusted for yield.

convexity.label: Convexity
convexity.helper: Second-order measure of curvature in Preis-yield relationship.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: procentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.

volatility_regime.label: Volatility Regime
volatility_regime.helper: Market volatility environment for stress testing.

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory Wert (USD)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Total average Wert of inventory over the proiod (e.g., monthly average of COGS-based inventory).

cogs_annual.label: Annual Kosten of Goods Sold (USD)
cogs_annual.placeholder: Annual Kosten of Goods Sold (USD) eingeben
cogs_annual.helper: Total Kosten of goods sold over the last 12 months.

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of monthly demand (standard deviation / mean). Higher Werts indicate greater unpredictability.

obsolescence_rate.label: Obsolescence Satz (% pro year)
obsolescence_rate.helper: Annual procentage of inventory Wert that becomes obsolete or expired.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Kosten Satz (% pro year)
carrying_cost_rate.placeholder: Inventory Carrying Kosten Satz (% pro year) eingeben
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual Kosten to hold inventory (storage, insurance, capital, etc.) as a procentage of inventory Wert.

fuel_type.label: Kraftstoff Type
fuel_type.helper: DeLaufzeitines carbon intensity and Energie content. Required for environmental loss calculations pro ISO 14067.

driving_cycle.label: Driving Cycle
driving_cycle.helper: Affects real-world efficiency deviation. verbraucht in Six Sigma process capability analysis for fleet variance.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage
annual_mileage.helper: verbraucht to compute total Kraftstoff Verbrauch, Kosten, and emissions. Typical fleet vehicle: 10k–30k miles/year.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: Kraftstoff Preis pro Gallon
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: Local Kraftstoff Kosten for Total Kosten of ownership (TCO) analysis. Eingabe for Lean Kosten reduction projects.

co2_per_gallon.label: CO₂ pro Gallon
co2_per_gallon.helper: Default for gasoline: 8.887 kg CO₂/gallon (EPA). verbraucht for environmental impact assessment pro ISO 14064.

num_parts.label: Number of Parts in Study

num_parts.helper: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 pro AIAG MSA guidelines.

num_appraisers.label: Number of Appraisers
num_appraisers.helper: Number of oproators or appraisers proforming measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

num_trials.label: Number of Trials pro Part

total_variation.label: Total Observed Variation (Std Dev)
total_variation.helper: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

repeatability_variation.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
repeatability_variation.helper: Variation due to equipment (same oproator, same part, repeated measurements).

reproducibility_variation.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
reproducibility_variation.helper: Variation due to diffeMiete oproators measuring the same part.

cost_per_defect.label: Kosten pro Defect (Internal)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Kosten incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, Prüfung).

cost_per_escaped_defect.label: Kosten pro Escaped Defect (External)
cost_per_escaped_defect.helper: Average Kosten when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volumenn
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced pro year for the measured characteristic.

defect_rate.label: Strom Defect Satz (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts pro million non-conforming based on Strom measurement system.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (False Positives/Negatives)
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, calculates Kostens from misclassifications due to measurement error.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oproating Stunden pro Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned oproating Stunden des equipment pro year. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen failure frequency and downtime.

number_of_units.label: Number of Units
number_of_units.helper: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

mtbf.label: Mean Zeit Between Failures (MTBF)
mtbf.helper: Average Zeit between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

mttr.label: Mean Zeit To Repair (MTTR)
mttr.helper: Average Zeit to restore a failed system to oproational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

cost_per_downtime_hour.label: Kosten pro Downtime Hour

cost_per_failure_event.label: Kosten pro Failure Event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.placeholder: Kosten pro Failure Event (excluding downtime) eingeben
cost_per_failure_event.helper: Fixed Kostens pro failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

maintenance_labor_rate.label: Maintenance Labor Satz
maintenance_labor_rate.helper: Hourly Kosten of maintenance prosonnel (including overhead).

reliability_improvement_investment.label: Reliability Improvement Investment (annual)
reliability_improvement_investment.helper: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

availability_target.label: Verfügbarkeit Sollwert
availability_target.helper: Sollwert oproational Verfügbarkeit (uptime / total Zeit). verbraucht for gap analysis.

industry_benchmark_mtbf.label: Industry Benchmark MTBF
industry_benchmark_mtbf.helper: Reference MTBF from industry standards (e.g., WERC, ISO) for comparison.

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Kosten pro Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Material Kosten pro unit of product, including raw Materials and purchased components.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Kosten pro Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully burdened labor Kosten pro hour for direct oproators.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Satz
overhead_rate.helper: procentage of direct labor Kosten allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 Kosten accounting).

defect_rate.label: Defect Satz
defect_rate.helper: procentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_time_per_unit.label: Rework Zeit pro Unit
rework_time_per_unit.helper: Average Zeit spent reworking a defective unit.

scrap_rate.label: Scrap Satz

waiting_time_per_unit.label: Waiting Zeit pro Unit

inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.label: Inventory Holding Kosten pro Unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Inventory Holding Kosten pro Unit eingeben

overproduction_quantity.label: Overproduction Menge
overproduction_quantity.helper: Number of units produced beyond customer demand (Muda of overproduction).

transportation_cost_per_unit.label: Transportation Kosten pro Unit
transportation_cost_per_unit.helper: Kosten of moving Materials or products between processes (Lean Ausschuss of Transportation).

processing_waste_per_unit.label: Processing Ausschuss pro Unit
processing_waste_per_unit.helper: Kosten of unnecessary processing steps or non-Wert-added oproations.

production_volume.label: Production Volumenn
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the analysis proiod.

shift_hours_per_day.label: Shift Stunden pro Day
shift_hours_per_day.helper: Number of oproating Stunden pro shift.

working_days_per_year.label: Working Tage pro Year
working_days_per_year.helper: Number of working Tage pro year.

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Industry sector for benchmarking and threshold adjustment.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, includes intangible losses such as lost opportunity Kosten and brand damage.

num_workers_exposed.label: Number of workers exposed
num_workers_exposed.helper: Total headcount in the noise/vibration zone (e.g., assembly line, press shop).

avg_daily_exposure_hours.label: Average daily exposure Stunden
avg_daily_exposure_hours.helper: pro worker, typical shift Dauer in the affected Fläche.

noise_level_dba.label: Noise level (A-Gewichted)
noise_level_dba.helper: Measured at oproator position pro ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) is typical action level.

vibration_level_ms2.label: Vibration level (RMS acceleration)
vibration_level_ms2.helper: Gewichted acceleration pro ISO 2631-1. Hand-arm or whole-body.

machine_runtime_hours_per_day.label: Machine Laufzeit pro day
machine_runtime_hours_per_day.helper: Total oproating Stunden des primary noise/vibration source.

maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.label: Annual maintenance Kosten pro machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.placeholder: Annual maintenance Kosten pro machine eingeben
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.helper: Strom average spEndee on repairs and parts for each affected machine.

number_of_machines.label: Number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.placeholder: Number of machines in zone eingeben
number_of_machines.helper: Count of equipment generating noise/vibration in the assessed Fläche.

avg_worker_annual_salary.label: Average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
avg_worker_annual_salary.placeholder: Average worker annual salary (fully loaded) eingeben
avg_worker_annual_salary.helper: Includes wages, benefits, overhead. verbraucht to estimate productivity loss.

hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.label: Hearing protection Kosten pro worker pro year
hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.placeholder: Hearing protection Kosten pro worker pro year eingeben

quality_defect_rate_percent.label: Strom defect Satz due to vibration
quality_defect_rate_percent.placeholder: Strom defect Satz due to vibration eingeben
quality_defect_rate_percent.helper: Estimated procentage of parts affected by vibration-induced quality issues (e.g., surface finish, tolerances).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual production Volumenn
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced pro year in the assessed line.

cost_per_defect.label: Kosten pro defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Kosten to rework or scrap a defective unit.

machine_power_kw.label: Machine Leistung Verbrauch
machine_power_kw.helper: Average Leistung draw pro machine during oproation.

vibration_reduction_investment.label: Vibration reduction investment (one-Zeit)
vibration_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for dampros, isolators, foundations, or redesign.

noise_reduction_investment.label: Noise reduction investment (one-Zeit)
noise_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for enclosures, silencers, acoustic panels.

iso_standard_compliance.label: ISO standard compliance level
iso_standard_compliance.helper: Wählen Sie most relevant standard for threshold evaluation.

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment (CAPEX)
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expEndeeiture including equipment, installation, and commissioning Kostens.

discount_rate.label: Rabatt Satz (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Gewichted average Kosten of capital reflecting the opportunity Kosten of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Jahre)
project_life_years.helper: Expected oproational lifespan des investment pro ISO 15686-5.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash InDurchfluss
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected annual revenue or Kosten savings geneSatzd by the investment.

annual_cash_outflow.label: Annual Cash OutDurchfluss
annual_cash_outflow.helper: Annual oproating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring Kostens.

salvage_value.label: Restwert
salvage_value.helper: Estimated residual Wert At the Endee of project life.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Satz
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation Satz for nominal cash Durchfluss adjustments.

tax_rate.label: Effective Tax Satz
tax_rate.helper: CorpoSatz tax Satz applied to Nettoto income.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Depreciation method for tax shield calculation pro GAAP/IFRS.

include_sensitivity.label: Include Sensitivity Analysis

planned_production_time.label: Planned Production Zeit (minutes)

downtime_minutes.label: Total Downtime (minutes)

total_parts_produced.label: Total Parts Produced
total_parts_produced.helper: Total count of units produced during the planned production Zeit.

defective_parts.label: Defective Parts
defective_parts.helper: Number of units that do not meet quality standards (scrap, rework).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Type of shift to adjust for fatigue or environmental factors.

include_micro_stops.label: Include Micro-Stops (< 2 min) in Downtime
include_micro_stops.placeholder: Include Micro-Stops (< 2 min) in Downtime eingeben
include_micro_stops.helper: If true, small stops are counted as downtime pro Six Sigma guidelines.

annual_usage_units.label: Annual Usage (units)
annual_usage_units.helper: Total number of office supply units (e.g., reams of papro, pens) consumed pro year.

unit_cost.label: Unit Kosten
unit_cost.helper: Average purchase Kosten pro unit des office supply item.

order_cost.label: Order Kosten pro Purchase Order
order_cost.placeholder: Order Kosten pro Purchase Order eingeben
order_cost.helper: Fixed Kosten associated with placing a single purchase order (labor, processing, etc.).

holding_cost_rate.label: Holding Kosten Satz
holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding Kosten as a procentage of unit Kosten (storage, insurance, obsolescence).

waste_percentage.label: Ausschuss procentage

current.label: Strom (I)

resistance.helper: DC resistance or AC impedance at Leistung frequency. Includes conductor, contact, and load resistance.

powerfactor.helper: Ratio of real Leistung to appaMiete Leistung. Typical industrial loads: 0.8-1.0. verbraucht for AC Leistung calculations.

phasetype.helper: Single-phase or three-phase system. Affects Leistung calculation formulas pro IEC 60364.

temperature.label: Ambient Temproature
temperature.helper: Ambient temproature for resistance temproature correction. Coppro conductor TCR = 0.00393 /°C.

current_headcount.label: Strom Headcount (FTEs)
current_headcount.helper: Number of full-Zeit equivalent Mitarbeiter Stromly working in the department or line.

avg_hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage (Base)
avg_hourly_wage.helper: Average base hourly wage for the role, excluding overtime premium.

overtime_premium.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
overtime_premium.helper: Standard overtime pay multiplier (e.g., 1.5 for Zeit-and-a-half, 2.0 for double Zeit).

overtime_hours_per_week.placeholder: Overtime Stunden pro Week (pro FTE) eingeben

hiring_cost_per_fte.helper: Total Kosten to recruit, interview, onboard, and train a new employee (including agency fees, training Materials, lost productivity).

annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.label: Annual Benefits Kosten pro FTE
annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.placeholder: Annual Benefits Kosten pro FTE eingeben

productivity_factor_overtime.label: Overtime Productivity Factor
productivity_factor_overtime.helper: Productivity during overtime as a procentage of normal shift productivity (e.g., 85% due to fatigue).

productivity_factor_new_hire.helper: Average productivity of a new hire during the first 3 months as a procentage of an exproienced employee.

quality_defect_rate_overtime.label: Overtime Defect Satz Increase

quality_defect_rate_normal.label: Normal Defect Satz
quality_defect_rate_normal.helper: Baseline defect Satz during regular shifts.

cost_per_defect.label: Kosten pro Defect (rework/scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Kosten to rework or scrap a defective unit (labor, Materials, disposal).

weekly_productive_hours_needed.label: Weekly Productive Stunden Needed
weekly_productive_hours_needed.helper: Total productive Stunden required pro week to meet demand (adjusted for normal productivity).

risk_multiplier.label: Overtime Risk Multiplier

cycle_length.label: Average cycle Länge (Tage)

luteal_phase_length.label: Luteal phase Länge (Tage)
luteal_phase_length.helper: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

last_period_start.label: Start date of last menstrual proiod
last_period_start.placeholder: Start date of last menstrual proiod eingeben

cycle_variability.label: Cycle Länge variability (standard deviation, Tage)
cycle_variability.placeholder: Cycle Länge variability (standard deviation, Tage) eingeben

age_group.label: Age group

has_irregular_cycles.label: Irregular cycles (variation > 7 Tage)

rack_height_mm.label: Rack Höhe (mm)

pallet_depth_mm.helper: Standard pallet Tiefe (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).

pallet_width_mm.label: Pallet Breite (mm)
pallet_width_mm.helper: Standard pallet Breite (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).

pallet_height_mm.label: Pallet Höhe (mm)
pallet_height_mm.helper: Höhe of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.

beam_thickness_mm.label: Beam Dicke (mm)

aisle_width_mm.label: Aisle Breite (mm)

rack_length_mm.label: Rack Bay Länge (mm)
rack_length_mm.helper: Horizontal Länge of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).

num_bays.label: Number of Bays
num_bays.helper: Number of adjacent rack bays in a row.

num_levels.label: Number of Levels
num_levels.helper: Number of horizontal beam levels pro bay.

pallet_weight_kg.label: Average Pallet Gewicht (kg)
pallet_weight_kg.helper: Average Gewicht of a loaded pallet, verbraucht for structural load calculations.

utilization_rate.label: Strom Utilization Satz (%)
utilization_rate.helper: procentage of rack positions Stromly occupied.

storage_strategy.label: Storage StSatzgy
storage_strategy.helper: Warehouse inventory rotation stSatzgy affecting throughput and space utilization.

forklift_type.label: Forklift Type
forklift_type.helper: Forklift type deLaufzeitines required aisle Breite and lift Höhe capability.

seismic_zone.label: Seismic Zone
seismic_zone.helper: Seismic classification pro ASCE 7 / IBC, affects rack bracing requirements.

include_beam_deflection_check.label: Include Beam Deflection Check
include_beam_deflection_check.helper: If enabled, validates beam deflection aGewinnst L/180 standard (RMI/ANSI MH16.1).

avg_invoice_value.label: Average Invoice Wert
avg_invoice_value.helper: Average moNettotoary Wert of a single invoice issued to customers.

annual_invoice_count.label: Annual Invoice Count
annual_invoice_count.helper: Total number of invoices issued pro year.

current_terms_days.label: Strom Payment Laufzeits (Tage)
current_terms_days.helper: Strom Nettoto payment Laufzeit offered to customers (e.g., Nettoto 30).

proposed_terms_days.helper: New Nettoto payment Laufzeit to be evaluated (e.g., Nettoto 15).

early_payment_discount_pct.helper: procentage Rabatt offered for early payment (e.g., 2/10 Nettoto 30).

discount_window_days.helper: Number of Tage within which the Rabatt can be taken (e.g., 10 Tage for 2/10).

customer_acceptance_rate_pct.helper: Estimated procentage of customers who will take the early payment Rabatt.

industry_benchmark_dso.helper: Average Tage Sales Outstanding for the industry (WERC/CFO benchmarks).

payment_behavior.helper: Typical payment behavior des customer base, verbraucht to adjust effective DSO.

pipe_length.helper: Total straight pipe Länge. verbraucht for friction loss calculation.

flow_rate.helper: Design Durchfluss Satz. Must be within pump capacity and pipe rating.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Dichte
fluid_density.helper: Dichte at oproating temproature. Water = 1000, oil ≈ 850.

fluid_viscosity.helper: Dynamic viscosity at oproating temproature. Water = 0.001, heavy oil up to 1.

annual_units.label: Annual Units Produced

current_defect_rate.label: Strom Defect Satz
current_defect_rate.helper: Strom defect Satz in parts pro million (ppm) for the process step Sollwerted by the poka-yoke.

defect_cost_per_unit.label: Defect Kosten pro Unit

annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Recurring yearly Kosten for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep des poka-yoke system.

labor_hours_saved_per_year.label: Labor Stunden Saved pro Year
labor_hours_saved_per_year.placeholder: Labor Stunden Saved pro Year eingeben
labor_hours_saved_per_year.helper: Estimated reduction in Prüfung and rework Labor Stunden pro year due to the poka-yoke.

labor_rate.label: Labor Satz
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor Kosten for oproators and inspectors.

discount_rate.label: Rabatt Satz
discount_rate.helper: Annual Rabatt Satz verbraucht for Nettoto present Wert (NPV) calculation, reflecting the Kosten of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Jahre)
project_life_years.helper: Expected Nutzungsdauer des poka-yoke solution before major redesign or replacement.

lmp_date.label: Last Menstrual proiod (LMP) Date
lmp_date.helper: Date des first day des last menstrual proiod, verbraucht as the baseline for gestational age calculation.

cycle_length.label: Average Cycle Länge

ultrasound_ga_days.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (additional Tage)
ultrasound_ga_days.helper: VerbleibEndee Tage beyond weeks for ultrasound gestational age.

cycle_variability.label: Cycle Variability (standard deviation)
cycle_variability.helper: Standard deviation of cycle Länge, verbraucht to compute confidence intervals and data confidence adjustment.

parity.label: Parity (number of previous births)
parity.helper: Number of previous live births. verbraucht in risk stratification (e.g., grand multiparity).

allowable_stress.label: Allowable Stress (S)

corrosion_allowance.label: Corrosion Allowance (CA)
corrosion_allowance.helper: Additional Dicke for corrosion/erosion pro UG-25

material_utilization.label: Material Utilization Factor

dismantle_hours_per_sqm.label: Dismantle Stunden pro sqm
dismantle_hours_per_sqm.helper: Standard Labor Stunden to dismantle one square meter.

utilization_rate.label: Utilization Satz (%)
utilization_rate.helper: procentage of Zeit scaffolding is actively verbraucht vs idle.

waste_factor.label: Ausschuss Factor (%)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated Material loss or damage during project.

region.label: Region
region.helper: Geographic region affecting Labor Satzs and standards.

include_insurance.label: Include Insurance Kosten
include_insurance.helper: Whether to include insurance premium in Total Kosten.

inputnumber.label: Eingabe Number
inputnumber.helper: The numeric Wert to be converted. Accepts any real number within double-precision floating-point range.

conversiondirection.label: Conversion Direction
conversiondirection.helper: Wählen Sie whether to convert from decimal to scientific notation or from scientific notation to decimal.

significantdigits.label: Significant Digits
significantdigits.helper: Number of significant digits in the scientific notation output. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the decimal output. verbraucht when converting from scientific to decimal.

engineeringnotation.label: Engineering Notation
engineeringnotation.helper: If true, exponent is forced to a multiple of 3 for engineering applications (IEC 60027).

useepsilon.label: Use Epsilon Threshold
useepsilon.helper: If true, numbers below machine epsilon (2.22e-16) are flagged as potential underDurchfluss.

total_units_produced.label: Total Units Produced
total_units_produced.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting proiod (e.g., shift, day, week).

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Number of units that failed quality Prüfung or are non-conforming.

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that were reworked to meet specifications (counted sepaSatzly from scrap).

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Kosten pro Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Material Kosten pro unit in USD.

labor_cost_per_unit.label: Labor Kosten pro Unit
labor_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct labor Kosten pro unit in USD.

overhead_cost_per_unit.label: Overhead Kosten pro Unit
overhead_cost_per_unit.helper: Allocated overhead Kosten pro unit in USD.

process_stage.label: Process Stage
process_stage.helper: Stage in the production process where scrap is measured.

include_rework_in_scrap.label: Include Rework in Scrap Calculation
include_rework_in_scrap.placeholder: Include Rework in Scrap Calculation eingeben
include_rework_in_scrap.helper: If true, rework units are treated as scrap for Kosten calculations (conservative approach).

total_work_content.label: Total Work Content (TWC)
total_work_content.helper: Sum of all standard times for oproations in the sewing line (ISO 9001 Zeit measurement).

number_of_operators.label: Number of Oproators
number_of_operators.helper: Total direct labor assigned to the line.

takt_time.label: Takt Zeit
takt_time.helper: Customer demand Satz: available production Zeit divided by required output (Lean manufacturing).

bottleneck_time.label: Bottleneck Station Zeit
bottleneck_time.helper: Longest oproation Zeit among all stations (Theory of Constraints).

line_balance_type.label: Line Balance Type
line_balance_type.helper: Configuration des sewing line: straight, U-shape, or modular (Lean layout principles).

allow_rebalancing.label: Allow Rebalancing
allow_rebalancing.helper: If true, the tool will suggest oproator reassignment to improve balance.

shift_duration_hours.label: Shift Dauer (Stunden)
shift_duration_hours.helper: Total scheduled shift Zeit in Stunden. Standard shifts are 8 or 12 Stunden.

total_units_produced.label: Total Units Produced
total_units_produced.helper: Total Gute Einheiten produced during the shift, including reworked units.

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Units that failed quality Prüfung and are not reworkable.

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that required rework to meet quality standards.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Kosten pro Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully loaded labor Kosten pro oproator pro hour.

number_of_operators.label: Number of Oproators
number_of_operators.helper: Total oproators assigned to the shift.

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Kosten pro Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Material Kosten pro unit produced.

energy_cost_per_shift.label: Energie Kosten pro Shift
energy_cost_per_shift.helper: Total Energie Kosten (electricity, gas, etc.) for the shift.

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift type affects labor premiums and Energie tariffs.

overtime_applied.label: Overtime Applied
overtime_applied.helper: Indicates if overtime Satzs apply to any portion des shift.

direct_labor_hourly_rate.label: Direct Labor Hourly Satz
direct_labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift diffeMieteials.

num_direct_labor_employees.label: Number of Direct Labor Mitarbeiter
num_direct_labor_employees.placeholder: Number of Direct Labor Mitarbeiter eingeben
num_direct_labor_employees.helper: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.

annual_operating_hours_per_employee.label: Annual Oproating Stunden pro Employee
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.placeholder: Annual Oproating Stunden pro Employee eingeben
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.helper: Standard annual Stunden pro employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 Stunden). Adjust for overtime or part-Zeit.

total_annual_overhead_costs.label: Total Annual Overhead Kostens
total_annual_overhead_costs.helper: All indirect Kostens: Miete, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.

total_annual_machine_costs.label: Total Annual Machine Kostens
total_annual_machine_costs.helper: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and Energie Kostens for all production equipment.

average_shop_efficiency_percent.label: Average Shop Efficiency (%)
average_shop_efficiency_percent.helper: Gesamtanlageneffektivität (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, Rüstzeit, and speed loss.

quality_yield_percent.label: Quality Yield (%)
quality_yield_percent.helper: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly Kosten.

shift_premium_factor.label: Shift Premium Factor
shift_premium_factor.helper: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift oproations (accounts for shift diffeMieteials).

include_benefits.label: Include Benefits & Payroll Taxes
include_benefits.helper: If true, adds 30% burden to direct Labor Satz for benefits, FICA, workers' comp, etc.

overhead_allocation_method.label: Overhead Allocation Method
overhead_allocation_method.helper: Basis for distributing overhead to hourly Satz. Direct Labor Stunden is most common in job shops.

material_cost.label: Material Kosten pro Unit
material_cost.helper: Direct Kosten of raw Materials pro signage unit, including substSatz, ink, and laminates.

labor_hours.label: Labor Stunden pro Unit
labor_hours.helper: Standard direct Labor Stunden required to produce one signage unit, based on Zeit studies.

labor_rate.label: Labor Satz pro Hour
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Satz
overhead_rate.helper: procentage applied to direct Kostens to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.

complexity_factor.label: Complexity Factor
complexity_factor.helper: Adjusts labor and Ausschuss factors based on design complexity pro ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Defines Prüfung rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.

quantity.label: Order Menge
quantity.helper: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting Volumenn Rabatts and Rüstzeit amortization.

waste_factor.label: Ausschuss Factor
waste_factor.helper: Expected Material Ausschuss procentage due to Rüstzeit, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing Sollwerts.

risk_margin.label: Risk Margin
risk_margin.helper: Additional margin to cover market volatility, Material Preis fluctuations, and unforeseen delays.

shipping_cost_per_unit.label: Shipping Kosten pro Unit
shipping_cost_per_unit.helper: Average freight Kosten pro unit based on Entfernung, Gewicht, and packaging.

defect_rate.label: Defect Satz (DPMO)
defect_rate.helper: Strom defects pro million opportunities for the process under evaluation.

process_sigma.label: Strom Process Sigma Level
process_sigma.helper: Strom sigma level des process, typically derived from DPMO using standard conversion tables.

annual_volume.label: Annual Unit Volumenn
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units produced or transactions processed pro year.

cost_per_defect.label: Kosten pro Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Kosten incurred pro defect, including rework, scrap, warranty, and customer impact.

implementation_cost.label: Estimated Implementation Kosten
implementation_cost.helper: Total Kosten to implement the Six Sigma improvement project (training, equipment, downtime, etc.).

project_risk.label: Project Risk Level
project_risk.helper: Qualitative assessment of risk associated with the project (technical complexity, resource Verfügbarkeit, stakeholder Kauf-in).

strategic_alignment.label: StSatzgic Alignment Score
strategic_alignment.helper: How well the project aligns with organizational stSatzgic goals (1 = low, 10 = high).

customer_impact.label: Customer Impact Score
customer_impact.helper: Degree of positive impact on customer satisfaction (1 = minimal, 10 = transformative).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy and reliability des Eingabe data (0% = guess, 100% = verified).

wake_time.label: Desired wake-up Zeit (24h)
wake_time.helper: Sollwert Endee of sleep cycle; verbraucht to back-Berechnen optimal bedtimes.

sleep_debt_hours.label: Accumulated sleep debt (Stunden)
sleep_debt_hours.helper: Cumulative deficit from prior nights; drives recovery need pro sleep science.

cycle_length_minutes.label: Average sleep cycle Länge
cycle_length_minutes.helper: Typical NREM/REM cycle Dauer; 90 min is standard, adjustable pro individual.

fall_asleep_minutes.label: Estimated Zeit to fall asleep
fall_asleep_minutes.placeholder: Estimated Zeit to fall asleep eingeben
fall_asleep_minutes.helper: Sleep onset latency; affects actual sleep Start Zeit.

recovery_efficiency.label: Recovery efficiency factor
recovery_efficiency.helper: Adjusts sleep debt repayment Satz (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = impaired recovery, >1.0 = enhanced).

shift_worker.label: Shift worker?
shift_worker.helper: Flag to apply circadian disruption penalty pro ISO 10075-2.

current_changeover_time.label: Strom Changeover Zeit (minutes)
current_changeover_time.helper: Total Zeit from last good piece of previous run to first good piece of next run. Measured pro SMED standard.

internal_operations_percentage.label: Internal Oproations (% of total Zeit)
internal_operations_percentage.placeholder: Internal Oproations (% of total Zeit) eingeben
internal_operations_percentage.helper: procentage of changeover Zeit where machine is stopped. Sollwert is to convert internal to external.

setup_team_size.label: Rüstzeit Team Size (oproators)
setup_team_size.helper: Number of oproators directly involved in the changeover process.

parallel_work_possible.label: Parallel Work Possible
parallel_work_possible.helper: Indicates if tasks can be proformed simultaneously by multiple oproators (SMED principle).

standardization_level.label: Standardization Level
standardization_level.helper: Degree of standardized work instructions, tooling, and die design. High = minimal adjustments.

waste_motion_score.label: Ausschuss Motion Score (1-10)
waste_motion_score.helper: Subjective assessment of unnecessary movement, searching, and walking during changeover. 1 = optimal, 10 = extreme Ausschuss.

subgroup_size.label: Subgroup Size (n)
subgroup_size.helper: Number of samples pro subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical Werts: 3-10.

num_subgroups.label: Number of Subgroups (k)
num_subgroups.helper: Total subgroups verbraucht to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.

overall_mean.label: Overall Mean (X-double-bar)
overall_mean.helper: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.

average_range.label: Average Range (R-bar)
average_range.helper: Mean of subgroup ranges. verbraucht to estimate process sigma.

usl.label: Uppro Specification Limit (USL)
usl.helper: Maximum acceptable Wert pro customer or design requirement.

lsl.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lsl.helper: Minimum acceptable Wert pro customer or design requirement.

chart_type.label: Chart Type
chart_type.helper: Wählen Sie control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.

use_estimated_sigma.label: Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar
use_estimated_sigma.placeholder: Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar eingeben
use_estimated_sigma.helper: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.

process_cycle_time_min.label: Process Taktzeit (minutes)
process_cycle_time_min.helper: Average Zeit to complete one production cycle. verbraucht to estimate units produced pro shift.

units_per_cycle.label: Units pro Cycle
units_per_cycle.helper: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

defect_rate_out_of_control.label: Defect Satz When Out of Control
defect_rate_out_of_control.placeholder: Defect Satz When Out of Control eingeben
defect_rate_out_of_control.helper: Expected defect procentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

defect_rate_in_control.label: Defect Satz When In Control
defect_rate_in_control.placeholder: Defect Satz When In Control eingeben
defect_rate_in_control.helper: Baseline defect procentage when the process is stable and in control.

cost_per_defect.label: Kosten pro Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Kosten incurred pro defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

detection_delay_hours.label: Detection Delay (Stunden)
detection_delay_hours.helper: Zeit from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

response_delay_hours.label: Response Delay (Stunden)
response_delay_hours.helper: Zeit from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

shift_hours.label: Shift Stunden pro Day
shift_hours.helper: Number of production Stunden pro shift. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen daily production Volumenn.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts pro Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of shifts oproating pro day.

operating_days_per_year.label: Oproating Tage pro Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Number of Tage the plant opeSatzs annually.

signal_frequency_per_year.label: Out-of-Control Signal Frequency (pro year)
signal_frequency_per_year.helper: Expected number of out-of-control signals pro year based on historical SPC data.

cost_of_correction_per_event.label: Kosten of Correction pro Event
cost_of_correction_per_event.placeholder: Kosten of Correction pro Event eingeben
cost_of_correction_per_event.helper: Average Kosten to investigate and correct an out-of-control event (labor, Materials, downtime).

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
include_hidden_losses.placeholder: Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales) eingeben
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include estimated hidden Kostens such as brand damage and lost future sales.

hidden_loss_multiplier.label: Hidden Loss Multiplier
hidden_loss_multiplier.helper: Multiplier applied to direct defect Kostens to estimate hidden losses (based on industry benchmarks).

area_sqft.label: Fläche in Quadratfuß
area_sqft.helper: Total Fläche to be converted from improial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

measurement_accuracy.label: Measurement Accuracy Class
measurement_accuracy.helper: Defines the tolerance level des original measurement pro ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

rounding_precision.label: Rounding Precision
rounding_precision.helper: Number of decimal places for the final Ergebnis. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

include_tolerance.label: Include Tolerance Band
include_tolerance.helper: If enabled, the output will include uppro and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

orifice_diameter.label: Orifice Durchmesser
orifice_diameter.helper: Durchmesser des trap orifice; typical failed traps have orifices from 1 mm to 20 mm.

steam_pressure.label: Steam Druck (gauge)
steam_pressure.helper: Gauge Druck of steam upstream des trap. Common industrial range 3–15 bar_g.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oproating Stunden pro Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual oproating Stunden des steam system. Typical continuous process: 8000 h/yr.

steam_cost.label: Steam Kosten
steam_cost.helper: Kosten to geneSatz one metric tonne of steam, including Kraftstoff, water treatment, and maintenance.

trap_type.label: Trap Type
trap_type.helper: Type of steam trap influences discharge coefficient and failure mode.

failure_mode.label: Failure Mode
failure_mode.helper: Failure mode deLaufzeitines effective orifice Fläche and discharge coefficient.

condensate_recovery.label: Condensate Recovery
condensate_recovery.helper: Whether condensate is recovered; affects Nettoto Energie loss calculation.

actual_labor_cost.label: Actual Labor Kosten
actual_labor_cost.helper: Total labor Kosten incurred by subcontractor.

actual_material_cost.label: Actual Material Kosten
actual_material_cost.helper: Total Material Kosten incurred by subcontractor.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead procentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Overhead as procentage of direct Kostens (ISO 9001 Kosten accounting).

quality_rework_cost.label: Quality Rework Kosten
quality_rework_cost.helper: Kosten of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).

schedule_delay_penalty.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
schedule_delay_penalty.helper: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-Zeit).

waste_factor.label: Ausschuss Factor (Lean Muda)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated Ausschuss as procentage of total direct Kostens (Lean manufacturing).

labor_efficiency_index.label: Labor Efficiency Index (LEI)
labor_efficiency_index.helper: Ratio of standard Labor Stunden to actual Labor Stunden (WERC DC metrics).

material_price_variance.label: Material Preis Variance
material_price_variance.helper: Differenz between standard and actual Material Preiss.

scope_change_cost.label: Scope Change Kosten
scope_change_cost.helper: Additional Kostens from unapproved scope changes.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding Kosten
inventory_holding_cost.helper: Kosten of carrying excess inventory (WERC warehousing).

currency_exchange_loss.label: Currency Exchange Loss
currency_exchange_loss.helper: Loss due to unfavorable exchange Satz fluctuations.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of subcontractor contract influences margin risk.

use_lean_accounting.label: Use Lean Accounting Adjustments
use_lean_accounting.helper: Apply Lean accounting principles to Wert stream Kostening.

contract_value.label: Contract Wert (in base currency)
contract_value.helper: Total Wert des supplier contract denominated in the base currency (e.g., USD).

foreign_exposure_pct.label: Foreign Currency Exposure (%)
foreign_exposure_pct.helper: procentage of contract Wert exposed to foreign currency fluctuations.

volatility_annual.label: Annual FX Volatility
volatility_annual.helper: Expected annualized standard deviation des foreign exchange Satz, based on historical data or market consensus.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: procentage des foreign exposure that is hedged via forward contracts, options, or other instruments.

time_horizon_months.label: Zeit Horizon (months)
time_horizon_months.helper: Dauer over which the currency risk is assessed, typically matching the contract payment schedule.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level for Wert-at-Risk (VaR) calculation. Higher levels indicate more conservative risk estimates.

supplier_credit_rating.label: Supplier Credit Rating (S&P equivalent)
supplier_credit_rating.helper: Credit rating des supplier, verbraucht to adjust default probability and overall risk premium.

use_iso_31000.label: Apply ISO 31000 Risk Management Framework
use_iso_31000.placeholder: Apply ISO 31000 Risk Management Framework eingeben
use_iso_31000.helper: If enabled, the calculation incorpoSatzs ISO 31000 principles for risk identification, analysis, and evaluation.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Preis pro Unit
purchase_price.helper: Negotiated Unit Preis from supplier contract.

defect_rate.label: Defect Satz (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts pro million defective, Six Sigma metric.

inspection_cost_per_unit.label: Prüfung Kosten pro Unit
inspection_cost_per_unit.helper: Kosten of incoming quality Prüfung pro unit.

freight_cost_per_unit.label: Freight Kosten pro Unit
freight_cost_per_unit.helper: Average shipping Kosten pro unit from supplier.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Zeit (Tage)
lead_time_days.helper: Supplier lead Zeit from order to delivery.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Kosten Satz
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding Kosten as procentage of unit Kosten (Lean metric).

warranty_claim_rate.label: Warranty Claim Satz
warranty_claim_rate.helper: procentage of units that Ergebnis in warranty claims.

average_claim_cost.label: Average Warranty Claim Kosten
average_claim_cost.helper: Average Kosten pro warranty claim (labor, parts, logistics).

supplier_quality_level.label: Supplier Quality Level
supplier_quality_level.helper: Qualitative assessment of supplier quality management system (ISO 9001).

use_eco_cost.label: Include Environmental Kosten
use_eco_cost.helper: Toggle to include estimated carbon and Ausschuss disposal Kostens (ISO 14040).

co2_per_unit.label: CO2 Emissions pro Unit
co2_per_unit.helper: Estimated carbon footprint pro unit from supplier oproations.

carbon_tax_rate.label: Carbon Tax Satz
carbon_tax_rate.helper: Applicable carbon tax or internal CO₂-Preis.

supplier_reliability_score.label: Supplier Reliability Score (0-100)
supplier_reliability_score.helper: Historical on-Zeit delivery and quality Leistung of key suppliers. Higher score indicates better reliability.

inventory_buffer_days.label: Inventory Buffer (Tage of Cover)
inventory_buffer_days.helper: Average Tage of inventory held to absorb demand or supply shocks. Based on lean inventory principles.

lead_time_variability.label: Lead Zeit Variability (Coefficient of Variation)
lead_time_variability.placeholder: Lead Zeit Variability (Coefficient of Variation) eingeben
lead_time_variability.helper: Standard deviation of lead Zeit divided by mean lead Zeit. Higher Werts indicate unpredictable supply.

single_source_dependency.label: Single Source DepEndeeency (0-100%)
single_source_dependency.helper: procentage of critical components sourced from a single supplier. High depEndeeency increases risk.

geopolitical_risk_index.label: Geopolitical Risk Index (0-100)
geopolitical_risk_index.helper: Composite index of political instability, trade restrictions, and regional conflicts affecting supply chain.

demand_volatility.label: Demand Volatility (Coefficient of Variation)
demand_volatility.helper: Variability in customer demand over Zeit. High volatility strains capacity and inventory.

transportation_disruption_probability.label: Transportation Disruption Probability (0-1)
transportation_disruption_probability.helper: Estimated likelihood of a major Transportation disruption (port closure, strike, etc.) in the next quarter.

quality_defect_rate.label: Quality Defect Satz (ppm)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Parts pro million defective from incoming Prüfung. Six Sigma Sollwert is < 3.4 ppm.

cyber_risk_score.label: Cyber Risk Score (0-100)
cyber_risk_score.helper: Assessment of cybersecurity vulnerabilities in supply chain IT systems. Higher score indicates higher risk.

use_advanced_hedging.label: Enable Advanced Hedging StSatzgies
use_advanced_hedging.helper: If true, applies financial and oproational hedging models to mitigate currency and commodity risks.

target_value.label: Sollwert Wert (T)
target_value.helper: The ideal nominal specification for the product characteristic (e.g., Länge, Gewicht, voltage).

lower_spec_limit.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lower_spec_limit.helper: Minimum acceptable Wert pro engineering or customer requirement.

upper_spec_limit.label: Uppro Specification Limit (USL)
upper_spec_limit.helper: Maximum acceptable Wert pro engineering or customer requirement.

cost_at_limit.label: Kosten at Specification Limit (A₀)
cost_at_limit.helper: Estimated financial loss (rework, scrap, warranty) when a unit is exactly at the specification limit.

deviation_at_limit.label: Deviation at Limit (Δ)
deviation_at_limit.helper: Entfernung from Sollwert to the nearest specification limit (Δ = min(T-LSL, USL-T)).

production_volume.label: Production Volumenn (N)
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the proiod.

inspection_rate.label: Prüfung Satz (%)
inspection_rate.helper: procentage of units inspected. verbraucht to adjust hidden loss estimates.

loss_function_type.label: Loss Function Type
loss_function_type.helper: Type of quality characteristic: nominal-is-best (Sollwert), smaller-is-better (e.g., impurities), larger-is-better (e.g., strength).

include_hidden_factory.label: Include Hidden Factory Losses
include_hidden_factory.helper: If true, adds estimated losses from rework, Prüfung, and scrap that are not captured by the basic loss function.

available_work_time_seconds.label: Available Work Zeit pro Shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.placeholder: Available Work Zeit pro Shift (seconds) eingeben
available_work_time_seconds.helper: Total planned production Zeit pro shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

customer_demand_per_shift.label: Customer Demand pro Shift (units)
customer_demand_per_shift.helper: Number of units required by the customer pro shift.

cycle_time_seconds.label: Actual Taktzeit (seconds)
cycle_time_seconds.helper: Measured average Zeit to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck oproation.

changeover_time_minutes.label: Average Changeover Zeit (minutes)
changeover_time_minutes.helper: Zeit required to switch from one product variant to another, including Rüstzeit and adjustments.

batch_size.label: Average Batch Size (units)
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Kosten pro Hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Direct Labor Kosten pro Hour ($) eingeben
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production oproators.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead Satz (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: procentage of direct labor Kosten allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., suprovision, utilities, maintenance).

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; verbraucht to quantify demand uncertainty.

flexibility_strategy.label: Flexibility StSatzgy
flexibility_strategy.helper: Production stSatzgy to handle demand variability: mixed-model (quick changeovers), dedicated lines (fixed product lines), chase demand (vary capacity), or level schedule (stable production with inventory).

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic Satz; verbraucht in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict equations.

gender.label: GEndeeer
gender.helper: GEndeeer-specific coefficients for BMR estimation pro ISO 8996 and clinical standards.

weight.label: Body Gewicht
weight.helper: Primary driver of Energie expEndeeiture; verbraucht in all BMR formulas.

height.label: Höhe
height.helper: Höhe influences lean body mass and BMR; verbraucht in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity level (PAL) multiplier pro WHO/FAO and ISO 8996 metabolic Satz classification.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat procentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional Eingabe for Katch-McArdle formula; improves accuracy for lean mass estimation.

isathlete.label: Athlete Mode
isathlete.helper: Activates adjusted activity multipliers for high-frequency training (6+ sessions/week).

production_volume_meters.label: Monthly Production Volumenn (meters)
