is_fatigue_loading.label: Fatigue Loading
is_fatigue_loading.helper: If true, applies S-N curve reduction pro AWS D1.1 fatigue categories.

joint_type.label: Joint Type
joint_type.helper: Wählen Sie weld joint geometry pro ISO 9692. Affects Volumenn calculation formula.

plate_thickness.label: Plate Dicke (t)
plate_thickness.helper: Dicke des base metal. Critical for groove Volumenn calculation.

root_face.label: Root Face (f)
root_face.helper: Land at the root des groove. Affects effective Tiefe.

root_gap.label: Root Gap (g)
root_gap.helper: Gap between plates at root. Increases weld Volumenn.

groove_angle.label: Groove Angle (α)
groove_angle.helper: Included angle of V-groove. Standard range pro AWS D1.1.

leg_length.label: Leg Länge (for fillet)
leg_length.helper: Fillet weld leg size. Only verbraucht when joint_type = fillet.

weld_process.label: Welding Process
weld_process.helper: Wählen Sie welding process. Affects deposition efficiency and Labor Satz.

material_density.label: Material Dichte
material_density.helper: Dichte of weld metal. Steel ~7.85, Aluminum ~2.7, Stainless ~8.0.

labor_rate.label: Labor Satz
labor_rate.helper: Hourly Kosten of welder including overhead.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Satz
overhead_rate.helper: procentage added to direct labor for indirect Kostens.

consumable_cost_per_kg.label: Consumable Kosten pro kg
consumable_cost_per_kg.helper: Kosten of filler metal pro kilogram.

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited metal to consumed filler. Varies by process: SMAW~65%, GMAW~90%, FCAW~85%, SAW~99%, GTAW~95%.

operator_factor.label: Oproator Factor
operator_factor.helper: procentage of total Zeit that the welder is actually depositing metal. Typical range 20-50%.

weld_speed.label: Weld Speed
weld_speed.helper: Travel speed des welding arc. Affects deposition Satz and Zeit.

wire_feed_speed.label: Wire Feed Speed (if applicable)
wire_feed_speed.helper: Only for GMAW/FCAW processes. wird verwEndeeet, um zu berechnen deposition Satz.

wire_diameter.label: Wire Durchmesser
wire_diameter.helper: Durchmesser of filler wire. Affects cross-sectional Fläche and deposition Satz.

use_premium_data.label: Use Premium Data (historical trEndees)
use_premium_data.helper: If true, adjusts deposition efficiency and oproator factor based on historical data from premium database.

weld_length_mm.label: Weld Länge (mm)
weld_length_mm.helper: Total Länge des weld joint to be deposited.

weld_throat_mm.label: Weld Hals Dicke (mm)
weld_throat_mm.helper: Effective Hals Dicke des fillet or groove weld.

material_density_g_per_cm3.label: Material Dichte (g/cm³)
material_density_g_per_cm3.helper: Dichte des base and filler Material (typical steel ~7.85).

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency (%)
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited weld metal to total filler metal consumed (includes spatter and losses).

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Satz (USD/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor Kosten for welder.

welding_speed_mm_per_min.label: Welding Speed (mm/min)
welding_speed_mm_per_min.helper: Travel speed des welding torch along the joint.

filler_wire_cost_per_kg.label: Filler Wire Kosten (USD/kg)
filler_wire_cost_per_kg.helper: Kosten pro kilogram of filler wire or electrode.

gas_cost_per_liter.label: Shielding Gas Kosten (USD/L)
gas_cost_per_liter.helper: Kosten pro liter of shielding gas (e.g., Argon/CO2 mix).

gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.label: Gas Durchfluss Satz (L/min)
gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.helper: Durchfluss Satz of shielding gas during welding.

welding_power_kw.label: Welding Leistung (kW)
welding_power_kw.helper: Average Leistung Verbrauch des welding machine during oproation.

overhead_rate_per_hour.label: Overhead Satz (USD/hour)
overhead_rate_per_hour.helper: Facility and equipment overhead allocated pro hour of welding.

rework_rate_percent.label: Rework Satz (%)
rework_rate_percent.helper: procentage of welds requiring rework (defect Satz).

rework_cost_factor.label: Rework Kosten Factor
rework_cost_factor.helper: Multiplier on original Kosten to account for rework (cutting, re-welding, Prüfung).

weld_process_type.label: Welding Process Type
weld_process_type.helper: Standard arc welding process pro AWS A3.0.

use_premium_material.label: Use Premium Filler Material
use_premium_material.helper: Toggle to apply a 20% Kosten premium for high-Leistung filler wire.

basic_wind_speed.label: Basic Wind Speed (V)
basic_wind_speed.helper: Design wind speed at 10m Höhe for the location, typically from local building codes.

terrain_category.label: Terrain Category
terrain_category.helper: Terrain roughness pro ISO 4354: A=open sea, B=open country, C=suburban, D=urban.

building_height.label: Building Höhe (z)
building_height.helper: Höhe above ground to the top des structure.

exposure_factor.label: Exposure Factor (Ce)
exposure_factor.helper: Adjustment for local topography and shielding, pro ASCE 7.

gust_factor.label: Gust Effect Factor (G)
gust_factor.helper: Dynamic response factor for wind gusts, typically 0.85 for rigid structures.

pressure_coefficient.label: Druck Coefficient (Cp)
pressure_coefficient.helper: Aerodynamic shape factor for the building surface (positive for windward, negative for leeward).

air_density.label: Air Dichte (ρ)
air_density.helper: Standard air Dichte at sea level, adjust for altitude if needed.

is_cyclic_loading.label: Cyclic Loading Consideration
is_cyclic_loading.helper: If true, applies fatigue reduction factor pro ISO 4354 for dynamic wind events.

turbine_capacity.label: Turbine Satzd Capacity (MW)
turbine_capacity.helper: Nameplate capacity des wind turbine model under evaluation.

capacity_factor.label: Capacity Factor (%)
capacity_factor.helper: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

capital_cost_per_mw.label: Capital Kosten pro MW (USD)
capital_cost_per_mw.helper: Total installed Kosten pro MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

opex_per_mwh.label: Oproating ExpEndeeiture (USD/MWh)
opex_per_mwh.helper: Annual oproations and maintenance Kosten pro MWh geneSatzd (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

electricity_price.label: Electricity Selling Preis (USD/MWh)
electricity_price.helper: Leistung purchase agreement Preis or wholesale market Preis pro MWh.

discount_rate.label: Rabatt Satz (%)
discount_rate.helper: Gewichted average Kosten of capital (WACC) verbraucht for Nettoto present Wert calculation.

project_lifetime.label: Project Lifetime (Jahre)
project_lifetime.helper: Expected oproational life des wind farm (typically 20-25 Jahre).

degradation_rate.label: Annual Degradation Satz (%)
degradation_rate.helper: Expected annual reduction in Energie production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

incentive_tax_credit.label: Production Tax Credit (USD/MWh)
incentive_tax_credit.helper: Government incentive pro MWh geneSatzd (e.g., US PTC).

grid_availability.label: Grid Verfügbarkeit (%)
grid_availability.helper: procentage of Zeit the grid is available to accept Leistung (curtailment factor).

turbine_type.label: Turbine Type
turbine_type.helper: Technology classification affecting O&M Kosten profiles and reliability (ISO 61400-4).

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance StSatzgy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Maintenance approach aligned with Lean/Six Sigma principles to minimize downtime and Kosten.

material_thickness.label: Material Dicke (mm)
material_thickness.helper: Dicke des base metal to be welded, measured in millimeters.

carbon_equivalent.label: Carbon Equivalent (CE)
carbon_equivalent.helper: Carbon equivalent Wert calculated from Material composition (IIW formula).

hydrogen_level.label: Hydrogen Level (ml/100g weld metal)
hydrogen_level.helper: Diffusible hydrogen content des welding consumable, pro ISO 3690.

heat_input.label: Heat Eingabe (kJ/mm)
heat_input.helper: Arc Energie pro unit Länge of weld, calculated from voltage, Strom, and travel speed.

joint_restraint.label: Joint Restraint Factor
joint_restraint.helper: Degree of mechanical restraint on the weld joint, affecting crack susceptibility.

preheat_method.label: Preheat Method
preheat_method.helper: Method verbraucht to apply preheat, influences heating Satz and uniformity.

standard.title: Usage agreement
standard.body: This calculation provides a preliminary assessment based on your inputs and DeLaufzeitinistisch methodology. Results do not replace quotes, investment, Engineering, tax, legal, or safety Entscheidungs. For Kritisch Entscheidungs, verify with your own data, qualified exprots, and applicable regulations.

elevated.title: Important usage notice
elevated.body: This tool models commercial or compliance-sensitive exposure. Ausgabes are indicative only and must be validated aGewinnst your contracts, payroll records, and local rules before Aktion.

engineering.title: Engineering reference notice
engineering.body: This tool provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity Entscheidungs require authorized Engineering review.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Legal terms and conditions for using SectorCalc calculators and services.

terms.heroDescription: By accessing or using SectorCalc, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to SectorCalc. By accessing or using our website and calculation tools, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

section1.title: 1. Our Services
section1.content: SectorCalc provides industrial and business calculators for informational and decision-support purposes. Our tools do not constitute professional engineering, financial, or legal advice. You are solely responsible for verifying any results before making business decisions.

section2.title: 2. Premium Features & Credits
section2.content: Premium tools require credits. Credits are non-refundable and expire 12 months after purchase. You may purchase credit packages through our secure payment provider. Unused credits do not roll over.

section3.title: 3. User Accounts
section3.content: You must create an account to access premium features. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.content: All content, formulas, algorithms, designs, and trademarks are the exclusive property of Sector Calculator (operating as SectorCalc). You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written permission.

section5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
section5.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Sector Calculator shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.

section6.title: 6. Modifications
section6.content: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

section7.title: 7. Contact Information
section7.content: For questions about these Terms, contact us using the details below.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How SectorCalc collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

privacy.heroDescription: What data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect personal information you provide (e.g., email address when you register). We also automatically collect usage data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) to improve our tools.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use your data to operate, maintain, and improve SectorCalc, to process payments, and to communicate with you about your account or updates.

section3.title: 3. Cookies & Tracking
section3.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and optional analytics cookies (e.g., Google Analytics) to analyze usage. You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.

section4.title: 4. Data Sharing
section4.content: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with trusted third-party services (payment processors — Stripe/Paddle, hosting — Vercel) as necessary to provide our services.

section5.title: 5. Data Retention & Security
section5.content: We retain your data as long as your account is active. We implement reasonable security measures, but no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at info@sectorcalc.com.

section7.title: 7. Children's Privacy
section7.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

section8.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
section8.content: We may update this policy from time to time. The "Effective" date at the top indicates when the latest version was posted.

section9.title: 9. Data Controller
section9.content: The data controller for SectorCalc is:

meta.title: Refund Policy
meta.description: Refund terms for credit purchases and subscriptions on SectorCalc.

refundPolicy.heroDescription: Refund terms for credit purchases and subscriptions.
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. Please read this Refund Policy carefully.

section1.title: 1. Credits & Subscriptions
section1.content: Credits: Purchases of credits are final and non-refundable. Unused credits expire 12 months after purchase. No cash refunds will be issued for unused credits. Subscriptions: If you purchase a recurring subscription, you may request a full refund within 14 days of your first payment, provided you have not used any premium tool during that period. After 14 days or after first use, subscription fees are non-refundable.

section2.title: 2. Faulty or Incorrect Tools
section2.content: If a premium tool produces demonstrably incorrect results due to a bug in our system, we will refund the credits used for that calculation (up to the number of credits spent) or provide replacement credits. Please report the issue with screenshots and details to info@sectorcalc.com.

section3.title: 3. How to Request a Refund
section3.content: To request a refund, contact us at info@sectorcalc.com with your transaction ID (from your payment provider) and the reason for the request. We will respond within 7–14 business days.

section4.title: 4. Chargebacks
section4.content: If you initiate a chargeback without first contacting us, we may suspend your account until the matter is resolved.

section5.title: 5. Changes to this Policy
section5.content: We reserve the right to modify this refund policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page.

section6.title: 6. Contact Information
section6.content: For refund requests or billing questions, contact us using the details below.
